name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79e942a461014fc39ce7fce659b243b6&_e=dhdWIdq3t5obxVksC4ZmlJpLzKRj1F281e6t6x3fKC5xqQprR47gKc-w6AuDvoPKYK-aIZxqxbKXQUjI_HE0YX1DJKEGgKANJGxJe-8MvUaf8KbB-AB83AAtnlgHcq_p4j6OVbvSUOrfGom2y22vWMU988qpFyrvTPoEqixicVr3KlNKIhj551PMXNDkZf2GnPUgS8KBeReL-2o2kISsA2wZ_ikySnsQLdEE2kB8ORSZKrHo8c8p95pphzcH23ACjOLC1Jp_uQ-0o4VbE0GitUvF852xf63gngXJj1Fka8fhfuIc-5nqLcUxrtVs9XRuaZaDfSkmVEMHavddSg0X0DDcRq8aP06L7eTKHhc3n7sZIRTQ7k3FCXRMM_rF2Y9hGbUB1AoA-EO_NYYYeqNdbQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The Federalist Papers ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. " The Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of " The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of " The Federalist Papers" today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Heads turned in Washington when I announced my plan to challenge Kevin McCarthy for Speaker of the House and now I'm up against the entire Swamp.
**_Why? Because they know that if I win ... I'll:_**
* Hold Congress accountable
* Use every tool to push back Biden and the radical Democrats
* And STOP the reckless spending once and for all

I need your help to rally the GOP behind my America First plan and get the votes needed to win Speaker.

| If you have not signed the petition to protect our second amendment rights by supporting the Firearms Freedom Act, we need your help. Gun owners in Mississippi know Biden is a threat. **Help us NOW before its too late!**
---
| Between 2006 and 2016, Mississippi’s firearms laws were incrementally changed to remove most restrictions on firearms carry and use, so that now citizens can carry a concealed firearm without a permit to most places in the state. But now that our state laws have finally (mostly) acknowledged our God-given rights as outlined in the U.S. and Mississippi Constitutions, the next battle is against federal laws and their ever-increasing restrictions that affect the purchase or possession of firearms, magazines, ammunition and accessories; and also attempts to keep records of all such purchases.[Sign the Petition supporting a Firearms Freedom Act](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Petitions/3560/Respond)

body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbad8baf61284665821c4d48b631c3ba&_e=1_aC8scXpWSURYMellohaW1WdWh0CSFjRCpVOk-gU7sshW8klJzKGqNKy6zCFgg2n0HxVoA3G-0C1Fx4evDzVNI7Ozc4i839zM_Bbjmns5xCzfBc7QBKEi2MdWZQh2N_a7jPyQoZJXx0NR-IuFM1OpFr7z6YA8XpUJcxkDMvhjxLsG2BDjrQMr2mDfdfu4iISugFYGernoVsm5qhDg8by2NK1x5PmHfFVubekY_9QvK18m0IMGeazqDqfeXsrNVnbLB42kFODkjtM7sK0oPkxw%3D%3D)

Hello Friend,

Radical socialist Kristen Gonzalez recently won a New York State Senate election and declared,

_**"We really proved that socialism wins! We are not going anywhere,**__**and we will not stop until we see a socialist slate across this city!"**_

And she's not the only one.

Maxwell Frost, the first Gen Z Congressman, is an open socialist and just won his Florida election -- even though his grandmother fled from Cuba to escape socialism.

The media wants you to believe that Gen Z is socialist -- but it's not.

They may fawn over socialists in Congress. Still, the nation's first Gen Z state representative was Malorie Stromswold (MT), a member of our pro-liberty state legislative coalition.

I am Lauren Daugherty, Chief Executive Officer at Young Americans for Liberty (YAL).

YAL is the nation's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing freedom on campuses and in American politics.

We have an ARMY of young grassroots activists ready to stand up against socialism in state capitals and promote pro-liberty bills. I've set a goal to help fund 10 students by the end of the week. It costs roughly $2,000 to send a student activist to key legislative districts.

[_**Friend, can you help fight socialism by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? Click here to donate >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cbad8baf61284665821c4d48b631c3ba&_e=1_aC8scXpWSURYMellohaW1WdWh0CSFjRCpVOk-gU7sshW8klJzKGqNKy6zCFgg2n0HxVoA3G-0C1Fx4evDzVNI7Ozc4i839zM_Bbjmns5xCzfBc7QBKEi2MdWZQh2N_xFkkuQw6Lfz-KjLPKDVmu_xR_RVOnnnRihvQ_Bty268VaHfK3WuHgC_PMzeK3lWdM83eGpNQ_MMfrUCmWsIbAoVcKEUbwweUPkWYqgE2OFvtD_LNNqq7AuaJaqlSYFRDqlcQuVtjBeqCIe2HU0hehQ%3D%3D)

Here's how YAL is fighting to take back our country.

YAL recruits and trains students tired of the socialism, Marxism, and woke policies pushed on campus.

But our efforts don't stop at college campuses, <<First Name>>.

YAL is creating a new infrastructure to win by training thousands of pro-liberty candidates, lawmakers, and student activists on how to effectively message the ideas of liberty and use the best techniques to win elections and legislative battles.

This became the **Hazlitt Action Program.** Here's how it works.
* YAL has trained and recruited student activists across the country.

* Those students go to critical districts, knock on doors, mail literature, and make phone calls for YAL-approved state candidates, who, once elected, join _our liberty coalition of 325 state reps_.

* Then, once legislative sessions begin, YAL deploys those students to contact constituents and lobby in support of liberty legislation our coalition members champion.

Every dollar donated helps us to recruit more students to knock on more doors and make more phone calls to **win more legislative battles for genuine legislation to make people freer.**

Over the last two years, our coalition of pro-liberty state reps has passed hundreds of pro-liberty bills. _In 2021, this coalition made 88 million Americans more free! In 2022, it made 91 million Americans more free_!

**For 2023, with our coalition, we plan to make 100 million Americans more free!**

subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc09a138ceb943e0bea85d0958ace4e8&_e=XronXga7GDNJX8Z8qeiBK4txLZJ7GkdUheROUzpZqqh_fj5Ctzgze628vl8hPbMYbgmRDQkfl7vXwpOnzIox8smFoJgNXiWhNNyL4zEX3_Hyc6hVDztASmw7GM-eICexE9YD_3i0z5IxF4W4wBDUyUMbh-yaJD2qILc8kfQYpr6EU5uZFRC3JEPXqzNenUbMxXw0kOhgYLLsZDfaqQICWA_uAbLpV7PT-5Pezl3SDsAtNkU0JnS5LhcZ88XZ248xdGA3eDB_qOHy8WfTWDmcJsgKAaqNGE1mUab7u4a-ptFAteLVvReTQkslkjC67HAxizsHmnxuD2g7dThWI-Ttdx8TthYgZSwpV31TfAP3UVS13AXz00QJ0uZgsZNRMJlU)

Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc09a138ceb943e0bea85d0958ace4e8&_e=XronXga7GDNJX8Z8qeiBK4txLZJ7GkdUheROUzpZqqh_fj5Ctzgze628vl8hPbMYbgmRDQkfl7vXwpOnzIox8smFoJgNXiWhNNyL4zEX3_Hyc6hVDztASmw7GM-eICexE9YD_3i0z5IxF4W4wBDUyUMbh-yaJD2qILc8kfQYpr6EU5uZFRC3JEPXqzNenUbMxXw0kOhgYLLsZDfaqQICWA_uAbLpV7PT-5Pezl3SDsCg_M0-Opykc8tM6Kl91b6IBun1nRUE1p1s_L1M8PsZMilXbfzXKaHXl9z-akPTJaxIlJ6BgQTp2MANnKSIGtO1YL4tbvvkB6WZnvlQWrD1sn_nTvgxuwud-hlYvs0N0U5X63s2zPBwQCgq_F2y1QTb)
---

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc09a138ceb943e0bea85d0958ace4e8&_e=XronXga7GDNJX8Z8qeiBK4txLZJ7GkdUheROUzpZqqh_fj5Ctzgze628vl8hPbMYbgmRDQkfl7vXwpOnzIox8smFoJgNXiWhNNyL4zEX3_Hyc6hVDztASmw7GM-eICexE9YD_3i0z5IxF4W4wBDUyUMbh-yaJD2qILc8kfQYpr6EU5uZFRC3JEPXqzNenUbMxXw0kOhgYLLsZDfaqQICWA_uAbLpV7PT-5Pezl3SDsDc5dgoDB_zEhoZMPk5rIJ6bJDTgRi5RGRW_UB3L-1PA1VEsX0REmWOvPVWRH1umN_ida1F2YKW5yQsrRFOmJKiNZn_01ANUjG_rRCjGvxbmTZwo7eUAKXP1kQygjaaJ54CuCQqcokJ7P6ga0UCmBS3) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? | | | _(Already took this action? Forward this email to friends so we can make as big an impact as possible! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom)_ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has led the charge on idiotic Covid policies that ignore science, and are based on nonsense, conspiracy theories, and derp. He's railed against vaccines, and banned even basic safety steps designed to cut the spread of the virus. **[And as a result, Florida has had one of the highest Covid death rates in the nation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f9b4a0d-fb1f-43fc-b4fc-d249afa2b2de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**

And now DeSantis is pushing a [new wave of even more jackasstical steps](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8b5f8e7-6722-423a-9724-380953bb9dcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that will make things even worse. It's a naked attempt to appeal to the Trumpishly stupid Republican base, in advance of a possible presidential run in 2024.

**And it's going to get even more people killed — in Florida and beyond.**

[**Tell Ron DeSantis: "Stop killing people with your moronic Covid policies"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0308e507-0588-4f67-9312-d4cb63aef6eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Steve Scalise, Next Majority Leader
subject: House Republicans named me the next Majority Leader! Now, I need feedback from our top 100 Patriots. Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am honored my colleagues in the House have selected me to serve you as the next Majority Leader!

**(1) INCOMING MESSAGE FROM
MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE **
---
Friend,
Hello, this is Steve Scalise. I am honored my colleagues in the House have selected me to serve you as the next Majority Leader!
To better understand how I can best help in this new role, I need your feedback. I'm only asking 100 of our most trusted Conservative supporters. **Please, be as candid, honest, and forthright as possible.**
******[ACCESS MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbfsvchg2qbcf0kr9i36jh9amfbl2lv7tcmndluo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1j6eoj2c5h2bs)**
This survey is only a few multiple-choice questions with the option to write your own personal message to top Congressional leaders if you choose.
[**Please, will you go above and beyond and submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey right here and right now? I 'd really appreciate your help. **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr2al91fcokdq9blkc4qrhj58l6v9okj54uam298_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1j6eoj2c5h2bs)
Thank you,
**Steve Scalise**
_Majority Leader-elect_

Parents have witnessed numerous atrocities this school year and the list continues growing at an alarming rate. One word many of us are seeing all too often these days: groomers.
An Ohio school superintendent's sexual (and criminal) fantasies involving children were recently made public through court documents. Superintendent of Lakota Local Schools Matt Miller's alleged sexual fantasies and desires involving students were brought to light yet somehow, he still has a job serving more than 16,000 students in 20 schools. As reported by citizen journalist Libs of TikTok, parents demanded his resignation at [a recent school board meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/163d815d-a428-42b9-81e2-3bf82608d30b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Parents from those schools and of those students aren't happy about it. Nor should anyone with any semblance of a conscience. This is the world we are living in now.
Thanks for reading 1776's Newsletter! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUxNzc2cHJvamVjdHBhYy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjkwMjQxMTExLCJzIjo4ODc1MTEsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE2NzEwMjQ2OTMsImV4cCI6MTY3MzYxNjY5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.JKdh-tyKMrvS8TA-GugvRcJBQ4mMZ9Vog_F6uaK8OCQ?)
**Toxic Whiteness**
A school board in Pennsylvania [voted 8-1 this week](https://substack.com/redirect/1cf43091-59f1-4af7-9f31-4fd78054cdf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against allowing one of their colleagues, Gregory D'Elia, to become the president of the board because he is a "cis, white male."If you are wondering what 'cisgendered' means, just means normal. The rationale from board member, Jennifer Solot, stated [she is against electing the only, "cis white male on this board,"](https://substack.com/redirect/371e4d14-4349-42eb-a060-c86418f0d30c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as president of the district because it, "sends the wrong message to our community." Solot then added she believes it important for the board to practice what they preach and that their words "have strength when they are spoken." The more we move away from meritocracy for our leadership, the closer we move towards mediocrity and second world status.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/9fddedd6-6478-4898-b7b5-8a38ca2e9840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**New Loudon County Low**
A damning sexual-assault cover-up in Loudoun County Schools led Loudon's liberal school board to suddenly fire its superintendent after a devastating grand-jury report concluded district officials lied and "the district was looking out for its own interests instead of the best interests of its students," [Fox News reported](https://substack.com/redirect/6a86f899-7051-435c-8e33-17a0c3587ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The special grand jury report released Monday agreed that the school displayed a "stunning lack of openness, transparency and accountability, both to the public and to the special grand jury" about how they reacted to the assaults on campus. The report also condemned Superintendent Scott Ziegler for denying any knowledge of the assault at a school board meeting. In January 2022, incoming governor Glenn Youngkin [demanded a new investigation on his first day in office](https://substack.com/redirect/45c6a440-f4ea-47ce-8e6a-5398b7e401a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Loudoun school board's response was to sue to stop the grand-jury probe, calling it politically motivated. The Virginia Supreme Court ruled the board's position invalid, and the probe finally got under way. The grand jury heard testimony from over 40 witnesses and reviewed over 100 pieces of evidence in their investigation, the report stated. Youngkin [told 7News](https://substack.com/redirect/6258862c-db5c-41e5-b55b-679c7f36d43d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that he was not shocked by the findings in report.
Attorney General Jason Miyares, who impaneled the grand jury, told WTOP Radio: "The grand-jury report showed multiple instances where the Loudoun County public-school administrators dropped the ball." He added that he hoped the report served as "a warning to every single school board in the Commonwealth" as an example of "what not to do" in a similar situation. Furious parents have pointed out that the board fired Ziegler did so without citing any cause. Because of this technicality, Ziegler will receive a severance package totaling $325,000, paid out in monthly installments.
[Follow 1776 Project PAC on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/5f70f10d-38d5-4edb-bb9c-fa603f1093f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In Philadelphia, parents decided it's important their children learn to be judged by the color of their skin. In Loudon County, parents thwarted the covering up of wrongdoing. If Loudon County's board was able to avoid transparency, accountability and common sense, imagine what could be happening in other districts, where corruption never comes to light. You get the school board you tolerate, stand up for what is right.

_DECEMBER 5, 2022:_
**Fox News:** "Is Big Tech going to be investigated once Republicans take the House?"
**Steve Scalise: "Absolutely... We told the Big Tech companies: SAVE YOUR DOCUMENTS!"**
* * *
Hello Friend,
This is Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.
I was just on national television to assure the American People that House Republicans will investigate Big Tech censorship top to bottom -- including the Hunter Biden laptop scandal!
[**But first, it 's critical we get the support from at least 50,000 Conservative Patriots to go on the record to support House Republicans and their new mission to investigate Big Tech's censorship in America. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zih730ldvjtsb5110rh2va8jqv9u8sdvt5hmlueg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm4or4c5h2bs)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: What a difference four years makes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, When Kyrsten Sinema was elected in 2018, she was the first Democrat to win a Senate race in Arizona since 1988. What seemed like a great victory for Democrats turned out to be...well, you’re subscribed to this list aren’t you? Since then, Sinema has spent four years in office hampering Democrats’ ability to make progress. Worst of all, she’s obstructed Arizonans’ fundamental rights – including the right to an abortion and the right to vote – in the name of protecting the Jim Crow filibuster. Her staunch refusal to give up this archaic, procedural relic for the sake of her own self-promotion and cozying up to Republicans has had dire consequences:
* Sinema claims John Lewis is her hero, yet she wouldn’t give up the filibuster to pass his namesake voting rights legislation (she also did nothing to help defeat Big Lie election deniers in her state or anywhere this past cycle).
* She claims she supports ‘reproductive freedom for all,’ but her support of the filibuster prevents Democrats from restoring Roe v. Wade.
* She has prevented comprehensive immigration reform from passing even while claiming to support it.
* She weakened President Biden’s domestic agenda, including preventing Democrats from passing affordable child care and paid family leave.

******[Chip in now if you’re ready to replace Sinema in 2024 >>****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcu0qHXyk6I9P25moR6duy8nF1xKWnot3CZ3DAjdbsMlCeylJD7wVMnwI36DaK0SiahuhmLG2-2UlqaHzfgoJ780igX-mllO7tVh4Je0FlCle1lohwXNKTNla3WjqViDK0aTA9W54QkIwXHTjXn4j3f61sEk6mAFaddVuRjw3eJDo4bQeopBhWhftC4MJxEF0hz_HXTRSpO4G086oNWLeXPq8bjsxEXRvdMCuvUuSuA3VeT8AXDKW0VJkbNkBCcwymefU6akX1rUJU6Dht0G40O41BWncKJ_aW0OO4MH7GXlQ/3rz/AJKpNc9dSlSJLOpKHqFIOA/h0/D2BUPTB3ul9pGv-xETmZkYzv5SJsaQ7TLc_qJ8OmPH4)** A lot has changed in Arizona since 2018. President Biden won the state in 2020. Senator Mark Kelly won two elections as a strong Democrat in 2020 and 2022. And now, Arizona has elected a Democratic governor, Democratic attorney general, and Democratic secretary of state.
Sinema’s entire approach to politics has been proven wrong – and that’s why she left the Democratic Party – out of desperation, not principle. Arizonans don’t want tax breaks for Wall Street and someone who cozies to special interests—they want someone who will keep their promises and put the needs of Arizona families first. Sinema’s entire career has been needlessly antagonistic toward her own (former) party and unnecessary to win in a purple state like Arizona where REAL Democrats can win (twice, in Kelly’s case). ******[We don’t need Kyrsten Sinema to keep this seat—we’ll replace her with someone better, a full-fledged Democrat who won’t stand in the way of progress. Chip in now to make it happen >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcu0qHXyk6I9P25moR6duy8vLYkJwjABUy0YGH3th4FBCpfpSRvcGQ15ckd4aKfpPVG55v2n7dLE7lXy9OpiMUM65n94Iwoaei7TXQWFrEoyg0YDqojT8qbJiG0NyvP4tJtPD3ev9G8nXQgUu32ESJArNT6JrxOsee9yvv-N8miP3AYk7EU17uuL2RJey7iPl07ooX8E_qOpd_jPxJI1MZZulzsdFzRlRf9UNzPUPqN20oUXVmHx83qGYH3rJM_fY7cK78sm891y-F47M1oN7LoevZ6HZQSTG8MSBKy1bfJus/3rz/AJKpNc9dSlSJLOpKHqFIOA/h1/2N767529NIyuY-NLSMvjOUpuAvsUpLPWxKxYvMIpZsg)** [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcu0qHXyk6I9P25moR6duy8hX9l-6RQFoW_WRzt2kCdoE_IK-1HD8g1Vept2cgb5cyn9S7T8ryrVVvdskl-fORm77E4eExmc6Rd5gUBR_BpXj3VXQXu1gRUcTDY3hKJTVSNHQBgIIwhiiamTt8t7xcxVqaL6Nca7x16N1AiNVmyy2lETO4Hw8SwKkTDQSTgFTevBTIGIS1HHZot3t5BeYM4-sVtyrWx7vHhWNPBeQbzsocZlQovRtMwaHRDPFktNsOsUxa4Rhi0h4C_-TByzy0izt_2qQL3Ik5yK7uqfHKEv8/3rz/AJKpNc9dSlSJLOpKHqFIOA/h2/h_SEDZHqZDNOnYzAuPHCSFeOkpu5nSZGqUqsSFqqscc) Thanks for supporting leadership that Arizona deserves, -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC (formerly “Primary Sinema”)

clean_body: | | Peter, When Kyrsten Sinema was elected in 2018, she was the first Democrat to win a Senate race in Arizona since 1988. What seemed like a great victory for Democrats turned out to be...well, you’re subscribed to this list aren’t you? Since then, Sinema has spent four years in office hampering Democrats’ ability to make progress. Worst of all, she’s obstructed Arizonans’ fundamental rights – including the right to an abortion and the right to vote – in the name of protecting the Jim Crow filibuster. Her staunch refusal to give up this archaic, procedural relic for the sake of her own self-promotion and cozying up to Republicans has had dire consequences: Sinema claims John Lewis is her hero, yet she wouldn’t give up the filibuster to pass his namesake voting rights legislation (she also did nothing to help defeat Big Lie election deniers in her state or anywhere this past cycle). She claims she supports ‘reproductive freedom for all,’ but her support of the filibuster prevents Democrats from restoring Roe v. Wade. She has prevented comprehensive immigration reform from passing even while claiming to support it. She weakened President Biden’s domestic agenda, including preventing Democrats from passing affordable child care and paid family leave. **** A lot has changed in Arizona since 2018. President Biden won the state in 2020. Senator Mark Kelly won two elections as a strong Democrat in 2020 and 2022. And now, Arizona has elected a Democratic governor, Democratic attorney general, and Democratic secretary of state. Sinema’s entire approach to politics has been proven wrong – and that’s why she left the Democratic Party – out of desperation, not principle. Arizonans don’t want tax breaks for Wall Street and someone who cozies to special interests—they want someone who will keep their promises and put the needs of Arizona families first. Sinema’s entire career has been needlessly antagonistic toward her own (former) party and unnecessary to win in a purple state like Arizona where REAL Democrats can win (twice, in Kelly’s case). **** Thanks for supporting leadership that Arizona deserves, -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC (formerly “Primary Sinema”) Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi1ul0nvlh29ls1da7lrshvab0tun4hrvt7qb05o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm0o74cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztbm6n2qjpncpm7oso9fn8hdepqok3lktqo00mfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zure591jc8fpefiv6a9usvv97r8pb1p3j06n3518_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm0o74cjh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1mnim9os7dq1fbmn2q75u5ajollog2n7mp1gum8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm0o74cjh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: American Action News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv27ds4p3rut86ncpidir4r06pu0lnvuo9ksq6i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm4ob0s1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7h84sj1t9ptn4p5809hkckgbrj6fno3tosnl0dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm4ob0s1h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkfjo6c8omso4m05m8gcsp544stmd1uh5abmgj9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm4ob0s1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

I’ve had enough of the Republican Party’s divisive tactics _and I know you have, too._
Unfortunately, even though Democrats had a strong showing in the recent midterms, Republicans still managed to secure the House majority. This means that they’ll be able to bring radical pieces of legislation to the floor.
From raising the age for Social Security to stripping reproductive freedoms from women, we need to be prepared for _whatever_ is thrown our way. I’m prepared to defend Nevada’s working families and to take on this new GOP majority no matter how big the hurdle. **I’m asking you to please stand with me in this fight – I can’t do this without you.**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Ten years after Sandy Hook
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
But for us, and the entire nation, this was different.
#

Please consider making a contribution of $5, $10 or anything you can afford to Giffords PAC today. Especially today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and that’s how we’ll create the change we need on gun safety...together.
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221214-1-15&t=1&akid=2864%2E3935704%2E83Qb0h)**
Friends -
Today marks ten years since the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School, an event that jarred many of us past good intentions and wishful thinking—toward courage and action.
Shortly after that horrific day, I traveled to Newtown to spend time with families grieving an unspeakable loss.
My family knows full-well about the wreckage left in the wake of a gun tragedy: shock, disbelief, emptiness and heartbreak.
But for us, and the entire nation, this was different.
We gathered in a living room filled with parents of some of the children killed in their classrooms, as well as family members of some of the teachers who lost their lives. And after talking to every family there that day, tearing up at every picture of the innocent children who had been robbed of the opportunity to grow up, I remember walking to a chair in the corner, collapsing into it and saying, "Enough."
It was five days later that we launched our gun safety organization, then-called Americans for Responsible Solutions. I could have never guessed that ever since that day, millions of people would transform our message of responsible gun ownership and commonsense solutions into a national movement to save lives.
I wanted to take a moment today to ask you to join us in keeping the families impacted by the tragedy in your hearts, and to thank you for standing together with us over the past ten years.
As I write to you today, I am confident of two things: first, that the work we've done together has already saved lives. And second, that the most significant of our accomplishments have yet to come.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221214-1-15&t=2&akid=2864%2E3935704%2E83Qb0h)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2864%2E3935704%2E83Qb0h) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and that’s how we’ll create the change we need on gun safety...together. Friends - Today marks ten years since the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School, an event that jarred many of us past good intentions and wishful thinking—toward courage and action. Shortly after that horrific day, I traveled to Newtown to spend time with families grieving an unspeakable loss. My family knows full-well about the wreckage left in the wake of a gun tragedy: shock, disbelief, emptiness and heartbreak. But for us, and the entire nation, this was different. We gathered in a living room filled with parents of some of the children killed in their classrooms, as well as family members of some of the teachers who lost their lives. And after talking to every family there that day, tearing up at every picture of the innocent children who had been robbed of the opportunity to grow up, I remember walking to a chair in the corner, collapsing into it and saying, "Enough." It was five days later that we launched our gun safety organization, then-called Americans for Responsible Solutions. I could have never guessed that ever since that day, millions of people would transform our message of responsible gun ownership and commonsense solutions into a national movement to save lives. I wanted to take a moment today to ask you to join us in keeping the families impacted by the tragedy in your hearts, and to thank you for standing together with us over the past ten years. As I write to you today, I am confident of two things: first, that the work we've done together has already saved lives. And second, that the most significant of our accomplishments have yet to come. With courage, Gabby Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Note from Tom:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
your efforts in my race made a difference | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55965716/383408085/1660491306?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20221214_1_1&refcode2=ef2d0b79-e37b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjJkMGI3OS1lMzdiLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IZ0o6wrGMkzPJMzOmd8yz7V86QX3rDsXaSv1swIgzo=&emci=eaae81c6-127b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=ef2d0b79-e37b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=19214294)
---
| | Dear friends, Yesterday, President Biden signed the Respect for Marriage Act, codifying into law the right of every American to marry whom they love, no matter what the Supreme Court might say. Last week, 39 Republicans joined us to pass this bill in the House, so we can celebrate it as a bipartisan achievement, reflecting what the overwhelming majority of Americans believe. But it’s just as important to remember this: If you hadn’t worked hard to elect a Democratic Congressional majority in 2020, the Respect for Marriage Act would never have gotten a vote in the House or Senate. Thanks to your votes, door knocks, and dollars, the Affordable Care Act is secure for middle-class families. Drug prices will be coming down for seniors. America is cutting greenhouse gas emissions and will lead the world to clean energy. Manufacturing jobs are coming home and we will be less dependent on China for technologies that are critical to our security. We’ll be fixing our roads and bridges, connecting every American to broadband internet, and New Jersey will be building our Gateway Tunnel. I have three weeks left in Congress as part of our Democratic House majority. We are racing to pass a budget that will fund our government and front-load aid to Ukraine, so that next year the MAGA crowd won’t be able to hold necessary spending hostage to their extreme demands. We are trying to pass the Electoral Count Act, so that no one can ever again do to our democracy what Donald Trump tried on January 6th, 2021. And as sad as I am that comprehensive immigration reform remains blocked, I hope we will at least pass legislation to protect the Dreamers before the year is done. Obviously, I wish I were coming back to Congress next year. But I also want you to know that your efforts in my race made a difference. Thanks to your support, we had the best turnout of any Congressional district in New Jersey, and I won the second highest number of votes of any Democrat in the state. In virtually every precinct and municipality that carried over from our original district, we did better in 2022 than in 2020. My opponent ran behind local and county Republican candidates in many areas, so we were getting some of the crossover votes we had worked hard to earn. It just wasn’t enough to overcome the loss through redistricting of some strong Democratic towns and the addition of heavily Republican ones. There is still far too much hate in our politics and violence in our country. But the overall message of this election is clear — voters chose moderation over MAGA, and problem solvers over performance artists, just about every chance they had. Our democracy is more secure than it was. The new GOP majority in the House will either find ways to work with Democrats to get some modestly good things done (we can always hope!), or it will pursue a radical agenda that gets blocked by the Senate and President Biden and helps us beat them in 2024. Either way, they will not undo our achievements of the last few years. Many of you have asked me about my next steps, and the honest answer is that I don’t know my plans just yet. But I will stay in touch. And I will stay in the fight. I know that you will too, and for that I am grateful. Thank you as always, Tom
---

* * *

| Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
---
Tom Malinowski for Congress
P.O. Box 263
Somerville, NJ 08876
United States
---

name: Steve Scalise, Next Majority Leader
subject: House Republicans named me the next Majority Leader! Now, I need feedback from our top 100 Patriots. Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am honored my colleagues in the House have selected me to serve you as the next Majority Leader!

**(1) INCOMING MESSAGE FROM
MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE **
---
Friend,
Hello, this is Steve Scalise. I am honored my colleagues in the House have selected me to serve you as the next Majority Leader!
To better understand how I can best help in this new role, I need your feedback. I'm only asking 100 of our most trusted Conservative supporters. **Please, be as candid, honest, and forthright as possible.**
******[ACCESS MAJORITY LEADER

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Inside the IL GOP and other conservative news
body:
“Our rules supersede those of the outside world.” More than just a movie line, it seems to be the mission statement for the IL GOP.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/37bc73001cae/alert-inside-the-il-gop-and-other-conservative-news?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Inside the IL GOP's Obsession with Money and Protecting Chairman Don Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In the movie The Skulls, Sen. Ames Levritt says (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zJO4Chs7-lg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Our rules supersede those of the outside world.”

But more than just a movie line, it’s the mission statement for many in power, including the IL GOP establishment.

In addition to rules not applying to the establishment, there’s also an unhealthy obsession with money.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

And that obsession played out in full display during Saturday’s IL GOP state central committee meeting when GOP senior official and chairman of the Finance Committee ** Vince Kolber (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-rips-mic-away-from-minority-grassroots-leader-during-gop-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
offended the entire room when he asked the more than 200 grassroots activists,

“I assume all of you have donated to the IL GOP?”

And when the room yelled back,

“No!”

He replied,

“No, then what are you doing here?”

Time and talent are much more valuable than money – and that’s something that the grassroots offers the IL GOP that they could never afford.

And since Kolber and his team could only raise $2.2 million this cycle, compared to Gov. Pritzker’s
** $152 million (https://www.businessinsider.com/dr-oz-jb-pritzker-wealthy-senate-house-congress-elections-2022-11?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, they most certainly couldn’t afford the time and talent of the grassroots.

By comparison, the Indiana Republican Party has raised $10 million in the last two years – a state half the size of Illinois.

But the belittling and out-of-touch moment drew an immediate reaction from the crowd – still stunned that a GOP leader could say something so offensive to hardworking, grassroots conservatives.

The moment also drew a reaction from Kolber’s friend and ally of embattled chairman Don Tracy – state central committee member Jeanne Ives, who in defense of Kolber, screamed,

“Vince is not your problem! This man gave me $750,000 when I ran against Gov. Bruce Rauner!”

Once again, it’s all about money.

Following the meeting, sources confirmed to Illinois Review that despite Kolber serving as a senior IL GOP official, he’s also currently registered to vote in not one, but two states – Illinois and Wisconsin.

Sources also confirmed that Kolber voted in the Wisconsin general election just last month, where Republican Tim Michels lost to incumbent Gov. Tony Evers, D, by just
** 4 points. (https://ballotpedia.org/Tim_Michels?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In Illinois, Republican Darren Bailey was defeated by Gov. JB Pritzker, D, by 12 points.

By comparison, Democratic Gov. JB Pritzker, who also owns a home not far from Kolber in Lake Geneva, Wisconsin – records indicate that he is only registered to vote in Illinois.
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Copies of Vince Kolber’s voter registration in Chicago, Illinois and Lake Geneva, Wisconsin, and a copy of Gov. JB Pritzker’s voter registration in Illinois. Although Pritzker has a home in Lake Geneva, Wisconsin, he is not registered to vote there. (Source: State of Wisconsin Elections Commission and Illinois State Board of Elections websites)

Registering to vote in two neighboring states may create problems for Kolber. It also brings into question his ability to represent the Republican Party of Illinois as a senior official despite being an apparent resident and registered voter in Wisconsin and Illinois.

And according to voter registration requirements in Wisconsin, a person,

“Must have lived there [Wisconsin] for the 28 days before the election with no present intent to move.”

Again,

“our rules supersede those of the outside world.”

But there’s a pattern. The GOP establishment’s choice for governor, Richard Irvin, who pulled
** Democratic primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in 2014, 2016 and 2020, but in 2022 ran as a Republican in the gubernatorial primary – he would not meet the IL GOP eligibility requirements to serve in a leadership role with the state party, because of his voting record as a Democrat.

Again,

“our rules supersede those of the outside world.”

Kolber remains a close friend and ally of embattled IL GOP chairman Don Tracy. And conversations amongst political circles in Illinois indicate that both Kolber and Ives have their sights set on becoming Republican national committeemen in two years, replacing Richard Porter and Demetra DeMonte.

And this could explain why Ives has yet to call on Tracy to resign, despite widespread calls from her conservative base to do so – and why she defended Kolber after he offended an entire room of hardworking grassroots conservatives for not donating to the IL GOP.

If you don’t donate, you don’t matter.

And if you are registered to vote in two states – that shouldn’t matter either.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=58391f8453-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_14_06_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-58391f8453-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

You can

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=58391f8453)

Below is the 2022 General Election “By the Numbers.” We’re often going up against deep pocketed polluters and candidates who will accept hefty contributions from them. Our work depends on grassroots supporters like you. [**Use your Oregon Political Tax Credit to support the OLCV PAC and help us continue to elect pro-climate, pro-environment legislators next year and beyond.** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55968720/383409695/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMmIwOGUyLWU1N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0tfIqkz7sy7PV2-CYFELl4Z6_Qzxln8AU8hVY3DsOc=&emci=84d410ec-247b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=412b08e2-e57b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) **$1.8 million invested**
OLCV made its largest ever investment in the 2022 General Election–$1.8 million. In the governor’s race–our top priority this cycle–we invested over $1.5 million in Governor-Elect Tina Kotek’s campaign, our largest-ever investment in a single race. **We sent 14 new pro-climate legislators elected to the Oregon House and Senate:
House**
Tom Anderson (HD-19)
Ben Bowman (HD-25)
Farrah Chaichi (HD-35)
Mark Gamba (HD-41)
Annessa Hartman (HD-40)
Emerson Levy (HD-53)
Daniel Nguyen (HD-38)
Hoa Nguyen (HD-48)
Hai Pham (HD-36)
Thuy Tran (HD-45)
Jules Walters (HD-37) **Senate**
Wlnsvey Campos (SD-18)
Mark Meek (SD-20)
Aaron Woods (SD-13) OLCV staff and volunteers made **22,600 dials to voters and volunteers** and **knocked on over 17,000 doors** **95% of OLCV-endorsed incumbents were re-elected** **72% of OLCV-endorsed candidates and ballot measures won** None of this would have been possible without your support. **[Donate to OLCV today using your Oregon Political Tax Credit](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55968721/383409696/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMmIwOGUyLWU1N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0tfIqkz7sy7PV2-CYFELl4Z6_Qzxln8AU8hVY3DsOc=&emci=84d410ec-247b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=412b08e2-e57b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230)** and help us continue electing climate and environmental champions. If you’re eligible, you can give $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC and get it back when you file your taxes. It’s like a FREE donation that you can use to support OLCV. Thanks for all you do,
Doug Moore
OLCV Executive Director PS: If you have already used your Political Tax Credit this year, or you’re not eligible, please consider making a [special year-end gift to OLCV](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55968722/383409697/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMmIwOGUyLWU1N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0tfIqkz7sy7PV2-CYFELl4Z6_Qzxln8AU8hVY3DsOc=&emci=84d410ec-247b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=412b08e2-e57b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) or make a [tax-deductible donation to the OLCV Education Fund.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55968724/383409698/1159068111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMmIwOGUyLWU1N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I0tfIqkz7sy7PV2-CYFELl4Z6_Qzxln8AU8hVY3DsOc=&emci=84d410ec-247b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=412b08e2-e57b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) |

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8T1F11VbMsIRKfEtd5BWe6wGFfEaqxUj10pvDOK7981zsynNVsiLQdR-qj25P2gjaQPiWjFwSSqHxJU8MSAmoSDEQFOCriSEHa2DfkYHKvQ-_8C4wwPy0W8vfd86rn4Ey48iER0yGH8ms_Ijgcw-uDshQiDf6V2xOkCURzjiBrkYi__Uil0rnCbsAG_ndGt43Jq0oNwH3L5pCYfJ8Awgk4Hk1xNLfrYOIojBQZ03FV8OQJKkf4TmdoqPJqAAH3Oo5kuYMG91XqNQLUSUtibhSIvqy7zIEb1CSZTyGVMLXfYIqSM7__no3zZU7-mdkkpk_6O9k2Yd459nFvDaMV7kyfA/3rz/t59S3Y4CT5iIkTP3DAPTYQ/h0/tWc9UWaCw559wrQ1gobdFIOLR2mOKAeULGNS3aDbcPY) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZwrwoYI92nGgfI4NvAm_rCoUEjDpHth43isxiWFMb7ouLYh4ALzDkD1jq5oUstU1b--TL9Fk1THlywPMhLlRTukrDtRtj1uXCoL23GxBMSXvtjf4aTM20I95usO07vawrwueKret7KqVd7ylBugMEMyAgg5n5uguKK-rq0AmXpc1i_K_GMzkxui3VhkbSk-Wyg433nzQs0nGqlDDrLKaL69ObCPYWG3uTO0BqIAh2ow8wJIP_bXWinvmvVMTcB8ikU91VtHybM4hOSvMMgjylenPD2B_UhzxXrqGdxDSQaleuSXSRi1KVj_4nFyV8LFR5K_XD8H-38dYc82aw_FzowA/3rz/t59S3Y4CT5iIkTP3DAPTYQ/h1/yWRgd1zD3vwl_RPs30LT4Dp2RYf_fO3KUGZsnWP316o) Peter,

It was an honor to fight by your side over the past year to overcome the most difficult test this movement has ever faced. I am deeply grateful for your support.

This election was tough. Millions of dollars were spent to sow division, hate, and fear. But we stood strong. We were positive, and voters responded.

Like all tough campaigns, we couldn’t risk leaving anything on the table on Election Day, and that means we still have some final expenses to settle up before the New Year. I know Mark from our fundraising team already reached out, but I’m following up directly because this is extremely important.

To cover the final costs of our hard-fought campaign, we need to raise $50,000 online by New Year’s Eve. We’re starting at essentially $0 right now, so we have a long way to go.

[Peter, can you split a donation between my campaign and The Collective PAC today to help us get there? Pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever works so we can continue working to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect in 2023 and beyond.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZwrwoYI92nGgfI4NvAm_rCoUEjDpHth43isxiWFMb7ouLYh4ALzDkD1jq5oUstU1b--TL9Fk1THlywPMhLlRTupYYK8RyqjzRdv64rQpowDyRRduZrY0j4ko6CcuWOvQqsKbT6cWuHsaueK3W8H3V-AgdEI8CM7y8Wxni-BMrWgQkFq0jMx6m89_9MV4hKbuoypAlXauJqDEJUJ8OYcPtelQNzPgZIaoYn7sZWCQZpnxbliHxEuonFuSa4RljlNuUnbQpWLi-Yxoza54dDxn74Qb0UQ5P-zA7YzK6OyV33bOIDcHLrq9_Xw81RZ-ALya9lR-AkYMpodoZ_QzjgYXWzQ/3rz/t59S3Y4CT5iIkTP3DAPTYQ/h2/_O-7Z072GthMx4VGUAgWAwxA_iG3pt_iAbawod0wh_I) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Keith Ellison and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, It was an honor to fight by your side over the past year to overcome the most difficult test this movement has ever faced. I am deeply grateful for your support. This election was tough. Millions of dollars were spent to sow division, hate, and fear. But we stood strong. We were positive, and voters responded. Like all tough campaigns, we couldn’t risk leaving anything on the table on Election Day, and that means we still have some final expenses to settle up before the New Year. I know Mark from our fundraising team already reached out, but I’m following up directly because this is extremely important. To cover the final costs of our hard-fought campaign, we need to raise $50,000 online by New Year’s Eve. We’re starting at essentially $0 right now, so we have a long way to go. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Keith Ellison and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Keith Ellison The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. **How many more elections will we allow them to rig before we say ENOUGH?**

| [**$25 TO SAVE ARIZONA**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoub9mte44juqv90pkg3rg5lopes21tl36ts7sk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm2ob4clh2bs)
---

Our team has filed one of the STRONGEST election lawsuits in history. Whistleblowers are coming forward, and we already have sufficient evidence to prove this election demands a total re-do.

**The courts will side with us — the law is on our side.**

The Fake News and establishment politicians are already trying to stop us because they know our case is **ROCK SOLID.**

**Anybody with a pair of eyes can see more questions than answers are being raised about our election.[We MUST keep fighting.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z52v2qt1idvflra6ruug46btbgd6vpmeeehsn28o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm2ob4clh2bs)**

**Election Day voters went out for Kari Lake 3:1, and the only reason this election isn’t on national headlines is that Democrats weren’t disenfranchised on Election Day — it was Conservatives.**

**_Kari Lake needs YOUR SUPPORT to keep fighting._**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4e6ded1990e46b9b8a2f1a5d2292e55&_e=So4UaILLdO1Ql7JKe51lV6RwXfDcxC3ZW-fbFZUVAteGOww2HeTDMBLmgmMFfTAD8qH4KuwiysBru4QtwQnLHFvdDkyMqUv1uTWcEEFDdLCmxPv0tFY8C1FO9KApw2rLg8OzlkJv6SeBgUyFQ7Komp6MzIsu7sRLKzghUSdRCElFsAQiDMQWQapb5wFQYzfZQ0RJvt_lB6yzID_anUsed_MQ--vmuinYguI7DP0pBLhBy-39iXtr9CRAHKAVWyscYXF8ELTTSXxrrND1zWnNUQq_AkhJqfmzUq2KKQtIGjgJ_xVCM3IvIj21ULZ3_oWvRhLlb5x6kCSz0b1WpCeffNpLpk8FZbM7tEo5ejlQaudo_E59rlMAk1WPdx4VwyC8H8TT1NaUjJgKzXZEkGZLhg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4e6ded1990e46b9b8a2f1a5d2292e55&_e=So4UaILLdO1Ql7JKe51lV6RwXfDcxC3ZW-fbFZUVAteGOww2HeTDMBLmgmMFfTAD8qH4KuwiysBru4QtwQnLHFvdDkyMqUv1uTWcEEFDdLCmxPv0tFY8C1FO9KApw2rLg8OzlkJv6SeBgUyFQ7Komp6MzIsu7sRLKzghUSdRCElFsAQiDMQWQapb5wFQYzfZQ0RJvt_lB6yzID_anUsed_MQ--vmuinYguI7DP0pBLhBy-39iXtr9CRAHKAVWyscVJa89LZJFZPe2xfPbCw8f6EDNRFny2oQrxxZlVO9W_DczwAwWJF1RNtWfYs1xDb-ucyelHSrzuMi5skbEQMxymd66xLbCYP-LQyrND7I2ls2ETLCAwebmoE9IqI9EsL4uh4_vfH3R9WXkbyFvYehwQ%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f4e6ded1990e46b9b8a2f1a5d2292e55&_e=So4UaILLdO1Ql7JKe51lV6RwXfDcxC3ZW-fbFZUVAteGOww2HeTDMBLmgmMFfTAD8qH4KuwiysBru4QtwQnLHFvdDkyMqUv1uTWcEEFDdLCmxPv0tFY8C1FO9KApw2rLg8OzlkJv6SeBgUyFQ7Komp6MzIsu7sRLKzghUSdRCElFsAQiDMQWQapb5wFQYzfZQ0RJvt_lB6yzID_anUsed_MQ--vmuinYguI7DP0pBLhBy-39iXtr9CRAHKAVWysctTGt1QQy9i_rvLJ7KG3X1AOihBwgd46i8qeeyICABkm64vr29lEyztCtX16ZABWSrdzoZPBBQnn1mcTy6ZBFXgcGqrj3jI0hpQ4Lt4ViQi6uWSMXbAkyg1DEDDejmSNgvxtRTaT7w2ZSrS_95C5n6w%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Will D.C. jail kill this Jan.6 peaceful protester?
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it gre
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi08r0idleksiv2ivvs1i7slbkqkm8qon4jcm6hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm1o34c3h2bs)
---
| | |

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlkkeau4metoh8qrhu2vseuf510vnnqf3qiu85k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm1o34c3h2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8eilo5rimgjo2a50fjfdqcllt63orn3gqh83s8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm1o34c3h2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsr0f4ls35f7rm0sll5bh6kajgabrtc9k72iuc2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm1o34c3h2bs)

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Friend, we can choose apathy or we can choose action.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We are again at a moment in this nation’s history when our values are being tested.
|
---

**It's not over.**

We are again at a moment in this nation’s history when our values are being tested. In the face of rising violence and hatred, we can choose apathy or we can choose action.

The path of action will require us to decide how we, individually and collectively, can make racial and social equality a reality.

To walk down this path, we must be frank about the challenges we face -- and the changes we need to make. And the truth is, we are a country where a number of our communities continue to face discrimination, hateful rhetoric, and targeted violence.

We are a country where Black communities continue to fight systemic injustice... where anti-immigrant rhetoric fuels hate crimes targeting Latinos... where Asian American communities are increasingly targeted by hateful rhetoric and violence... where Indigenous cultures have endured centuries of unfair treatment... where our LGBTQ+ communities face violence in the spaces they’ve created to be safe... and where people of diverse faiths have seen violence in their synagogues, churches, and temples.

[**This is our current truth, but it doesn’t need to be our common future.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55970464/383415064/-487094043?source=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&refcode=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzNmRlYWUzLWU5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v56BWAH-9tW_9iHPfuvaNP0Zpr6023JgOGJRvdmKLOc=&emci=04ce4911-bb7b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=136deae3-e97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=8431045)

I’ve been reflecting in recent days. The antisemitic hate on display recently reminds me that even after demagogues have left office, the plague of hatred remains. It’s a lesson we have seen play out generation after generation.

The opponents are still the same. The imperative for action still exists. This is a battle that cannot be lost.

[**In some ways, we can look to the past for the way forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55970465/383415098/-487094043?source=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&refcode=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzNmRlYWUzLWU5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v56BWAH-9tW_9iHPfuvaNP0Zpr6023JgOGJRvdmKLOc=&emci=04ce4911-bb7b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=136deae3-e97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=8431045)

In the early 20th century, a small group of Jews and African Americans joined together to form the NAACP, one of the most powerful forces for positive change in our nation’s history.

During the civil rights era, Jews and African Americans joined together to march, protest, and fight for changes to our laws that would abolish a system of American apartheid.

Last week, after winning re-election, Senator Raphael Warnock made sure to recognize what happens when communities come together.

The Reverend said, “Georgia, once again... you sent an African American man and a Jewish man to the Senate in one fell swoop. You are sending a clear message to the country about the kind of world we want for our children.”

[**This is a time of significant challenge and significant consequence.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55970466/383415132/-487094043?source=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&refcode=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzNmRlYWUzLWU5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v56BWAH-9tW_9iHPfuvaNP0Zpr6023JgOGJRvdmKLOc=&emci=04ce4911-bb7b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=136deae3-e97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=8431045)

The path forward is uncharted. We will need to dismantle generations of barriers -- both social and systemic. And it will take a level of collective civic engagement from a diverse coalition of allies that our country has never seen before. I believe the change we seek is possible, but I know it’s not promised.

I’m asking you to join me on this path. The fights against voter suppression, gerrymandering -- these are the civil rights issues of our time. Before we can build a better vision, we must dismantle the tools used to impede our full participation in this democracy. **[Will you pledge to be one of the people who chooses action over apathy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55970468/383415140/-487094043?source=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&refcode=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzNmRlYWUzLWU5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v56BWAH-9tW_9iHPfuvaNP0Zpr6023JgOGJRvdmKLOc=&emci=04ce4911-bb7b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=136deae3-e97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=8431045)**
[PLEDGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55970470/383415147/-487094043?source=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&refcode=20221214_AOTL_A_EHHally_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzNmRlYWUzLWU5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=v56BWAH-9tW_9iHPfuvaNP0Zpr6023JgOGJRvdmKLOc=&emci=04ce4911-bb7b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=136deae3-e97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=8431045)
---
In solidarity,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.

With 2023 just around the corner, my team and I are launching a $25,000 end-of-year goal. Winning races like ours requires 24/7 organizing, and we need to sustain and expand on what we built this year.

I’ve been so proud to represent you and the people of Ohio. And while we have accomplished so much, I know there is a lot more for us to do together.

So I hope you can understand why my team and I are reaching out for your help to hit our end-of-year organizing goal.

[**Can I count on your $10 or more to make sure we’re able to hit our 2023 New Year fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55970628/383416010/-205008097?refcode=EM_FR_221214EOY1_N_MK_45DA_4_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjRlMDU0ZS1lYTdiLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12BlYzglDvMQ0bf9xbjlGgojGblGbT5phxrIhMyrrII=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55970629/383416011/-205008097?refcode=EM_FR_221214EOY1_N_MK_45DA_4_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjRlMDU0ZS1lYTdiLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=12BlYzglDvMQ0bf9xbjlGgojGblGbT5phxrIhMyrrII=) Thank you for being on this team,

Marcy Kaptur

body:
CNN: “Biden plan[s] to put South Carolina first on 2024 primary calendar”

TAKE THE POLL: Should Democrats shake up the primary voting calendar?

YES! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc_em_pet_postelection22?refcode=em_UTC_PET_SCProposal_121422_Actives45_y1]
NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc_em_pet_postelection22?refcode=em_UTC_PET_SCProposal_121422_Actives45_n1]

We are witnessing HISTORY, Peter.
President Biden is advocating to seriously shake up the traditional presidential primary calendar and replace Iowa with South Carolina as the first state to vote in the Democratic primary process. Following closely after would be Nevada, New Hampshire, Georgia and Michigan.

This dramatic shake up would give voters of color a louder and earlier voice in our democracy.
But we want to know where you stand, Peter!

TAKE OUR ONE-QUESTION POLL NOW!
BEFORE MIDNIGHT, TELL US:
Should Democrats shake up the primary voting calendar?

YES! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc_em_pet_postelection22?refcode=em_UTC_PET_SCProposal_121422_Actives45_Y2]

Thanks for your input,
Unite the Country

clean_body: CNN: “Biden plan[s] to put South Carolina first on 2024 primary calendar” TAKE THE POLL: Should Democrats shake up the primary voting calendar? YES! [] NO [] We are witnessing HISTORY, Peter. President Biden is advocating to seriously shake up the traditional presidential primary calendar and replace Iowa with South Carolina as the first state to vote in the Democratic primary process. Following closely after would be Nevada, New Hampshire, Georgia and Michigan. This dramatic shake up would give voters of color a louder and earlier voice in our democracy. But we want to know where you stand, Peter! TAKE OUR ONE-QUESTION POLL NOW! BEFORE MIDNIGHT, TELL US: Should Democrats shake up the primary voting calendar? YES!
