Hey team, Believe it or not, we’re already halfway through December! **The end of 2022 is only two weeks away, and so is our End-of-Year fundraising deadline.** You might be wondering why we’re asking for donations since the November election ended. Well, a campaign doesn’t end once we win — in fact, our work is just getting started. While Gabe goes to Washington to fight for the best interests of NM-02’s working families, we have to rebuild our campaign infrastructure and start preparing for the 2024 race, especially since this one was so close and Yvette Herrell has already filed for a rematch! For the voters of New Mexico’s Second District, it is not enough to campaign immediately before an election — we are working to build a 365-days-a-year presence so we can hold this seat next election and for years to come! **It takes resources to keep our campaign active and continue reaching out to New Mexicans where they’re at. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 before the year ends at midnight on December 31.** **[Since we’re only about two weeks away and behind on our goal, I need to ask: can you chip in $10 or any amount right now to support Gabe and help us pick up the pace?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55971540/383420354/685856095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221214mm1_cm_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzFlNGM2NS1lZjdiLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HLgw3U6FH7WboRB5NCscg4Ybm9pRB6G2HMXyTJleXX8=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Our Revolution
subject: help us end the war on drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8122?t=1011&akid=3831%2E5885482%2EOzf00w ]The Senate could expunge marijuana convictions before end-of-year. Demand
they get it done!

Peter Willis,

Marijuana criminalization has been used as a tool
to incarcerate and oppress communities of color. According to the ACLU, Black
Americans are 3.6 times more likely to be arrested than white Americans despite
similar consumption rates.

That’s why Our Revolution is thrilled that the Senate is considering marijuana
reform as part of the end-of-the-year legislative session, including
expungements for previous convictions and normalizing adult-use programs now
active in 21 states by providing access to banking.

Our Revolution groups fought hard to pass marijuana legalization proposals in
Arizona, New Jersey, and other states, and now we need your help to demand the
Senate take action nationally.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8122?t=1012&akid=3831%2E5885482%2EOzf00w ]Click here to call on Congress to take action on marijuana before the end of
the year!

Not only is marijuana’s demonized status a tool for racial oppression, but a
path toward decriminalization is the rare issue in America that has bipartisan
support.

With nearly 7 in 10 Americans supporting decriminalization, now is the time to
take action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8122?t=1013&akid=3831%2E5885482%2EOzf00w ]Tell your Congressperson to act on righting the wrongs of the failed drug
war!

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Frances Hui
subject: The cruelty in China [WATCH HERE]
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075938:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
Peter,

When I was 14, I faced tear gas and pepper spray while fighting for my home.

You see, I grew up in a city owned by a country I don't belong to.

**Hong Kong is a city that was once free.**

The Chinese Communist Party (CCP) imposed a national security law that cracked down on political activism in Hong Kong. Offenders could face penalties of up to life in prison.

With my record of activism and participating in protests, I only had two options:
1. Wait for the CCP to knock down my door and arrest me.
2. Or leave my home and continue the fight.

_Now, I am the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America_.

My name is Frances Hui -- former journalist, director of We The Hongkongers, and speaker with the Dissident Project.

The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide.

The American media doesn't like to talk about China.
**But I'm not afraid to share my story.** That's why I am asking for your help to educate 10,000 students about the tyranny in China.

[_**Can you help me connect with these students by sending a gift of any amount today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075938:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)

This is just a small part of my story and what I want to share with 10,000 students.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075938:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)

China is the 21st-century version of totalitarianism. And the CCP's takeover of Hong Kong has left no part of our lives untouched. They are turning Hong Kong into China.

The Chinese Communist Party has done its best to silence any news of opposition.

This is why the Dissident Project is so valuable. _**It might be the only time these high school students get to hear the truth**_ about how life in Hong Kong has radically changed since being under the thumb of the CCP.

**I want to share my story with students across America. **

[_**Will you help me reach more high school students with my story? Your generous gift helps me travel to high schools across the country. Please donate by clicking here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075938:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)

**Let me share how the Dissident Project works:**

Dissident Project speakers come from countries like Venezuela, Cuba, North Korea, and China.

We undergo a rigorous audition and training process. There we learn to communicate our experiences in a _powerful but compassionate_ way.

Topics like this can be tough for students to understand, but _we have learned how to address students and have mastered the art of covering difficult and complex issues for young audiences. _

The Dissident Project is a not-for-profit endeavor. We don't charge schools for access to our speakers, so their testimonies are more accessible to all.

**But to keep our services completely free, we rely on the generosity of our donors. Will you chip in today and support the Dissident Project?**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075939:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075940:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075941:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075942:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075943:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075944:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62075938:JWNbZVG3N:m:1:3253819041:B336F7A1147C1C3F49A43716CE7A7B12:r)

Thank you,

Frances Hui

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

subject: Will you read the January 6th Committee’s final report?
body:
The House Select Committee is set to release their final report of the January 6th investigation on December 21st. | | |
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS: The House Select Committee is set to release their final report of the January 6th investigation to the public on December 21st.** The House Select Committee has been working tirelessly for nearly two years on this investigation – some of which directly implicates Republican state legislators across the country – and we believe that the public should be given the opportunity to see the _full_ truth behind Jan. 6th. We’ve already seen some of the committee’s findings during televised hearings, but there could be much more in the written report.
Remember: this investigation not only looked into Trump, but state election officials and legislators in states like Arizona and Georgia – so it could reveal critical information that could help us fight insurrectionists and election deniers on the state level.

name: American Briefing
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsbekdpstmg2p0gbbtgco7o5bdfjq3ko4bqp6qi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm9or7c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z73iesljb06rk0cpoo6g265mankclo14f7qvmvlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm9or7c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvr8k4bdh1frm765cppgthp54kpso6g3j5phgh90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c1gm9or7c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

The DNC is helping elect Democrats nationwide who will fight tirelessly for the Biden-Harris agenda, so I hope you will support them today. | |

Throughout the years, I’ve learned that there are at least three things that can make Joe smile from ear to ear: Our kids and grandkids, chocolate chip ice cream, and getting to talk one-on-one with Americans like you, Derek. Having the chance to hear your hopes and dreams grounds Joe and motivates him to keep fighting the hard battles. That’s why Joe would love nothing more than to give you a call soon. **Donate $7 to the DNC, and you could be one of the grassroots supporters Joe calls to thank personally for being a part of this incredible team.**

clean_body: The DNC is helping elect Democrats nationwide who will fight tirelessly for the Biden-Harris agenda, so I hope you will support them today. | | Throughout the years, I’ve learned that there are at least three things that can make Joe smile from ear to ear: Our kids and grandkids, chocolate chip ice cream, and getting to talk one-on-one with Americans like you, Derek. Having the chance to hear your hopes and dreams grounds Joe and motivates him to keep fighting the hard battles. That’s why Joe would love nothing more than to give you a call soon. Donate $7 to the DNC, and you could be one of the grassroots supporters Joe calls to thank personally for being a part of this incredible team. Joe and Kamala are fighting day and night for you and your family, but they need allies in Congress to help make the changes we all need. With more Democrats in Washington, we’ll be able to pass more consequential legislation like the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. The DNC is essential to electing Democrats nationwide who will fight tirelessly for the Biden-Harris agenda, so I hope you will support them today. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Watch ‘Innovation Race’ from home!
body:
| | |
---
December is such a joyous month – but also an incredibly busy month! So, I want to make sure you’ve seen that our latest documentary, _Innovation Race,_ is now available to stream at home, when it works for you. This means you don’t have to go out to see it, and if you’re looking for a really interesting and important film to watch, you can now watch it from the comfort of your own home! All you have to do is [**go to the website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-eD9sGSPz9qF4v6hig) to buy your Virtual Cinema tickets. The film will be available in this format for a few more weeks, but the clock is ticking, **so don’t wait!**
---
[PURCHASE TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin P.S. Don’t forget to check out our [**Innovation Race Podcast**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MTk3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/-bL8heSfc745GNHH1EiD_Q) as well!
---
|
---
**FILM SYNOPSIS** For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. _Innovation Race_ explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation.
---
[PURCHASE TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---

subject: And there it is: the VA GOP’s total abortion ban

body:
HB 1395 would ban abortion statewide, without ANY exceptions.

|

clean_body: HB 1395 would ban abortion statewide, without ANY exceptions. | Derek, Far-right state delegate Marie March just pre-filed HB 1395, a bill for the upcoming General Assembly session that would make abortion in the Commonwealth illegal – without any exceptions. When Roe was struck down this summer, Glenn Youngkin promised he’d sign “any bill to protect life.” It’s precisely what Youngkin and the VA GOP have been after this whole time. We need your help. With the Special Election in SD-07, it’s more critical than ever that we raise the funds necessary to win that race and add another brick to the Senate Dems’ “brick wall,” definitively stopping Del. March’s extreme abortion ban before it ever lands on Glenn Youngkin’s desk. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** Abortion rights in the Commonwealth have not been in greater jeopardy at any time in the last 50 years. = Virginia Democrats =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. clean_body: We knew something was up. We knew something was up. | FLASHBACK The Night Before The Botched Election We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned. "We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?" -Kari lake We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls. It was worse than we could have ever imagined. Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it’s only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself. We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game — and we need to be ready for the long haul. | Best, Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

body:

_DECEMBER 5, 2022:_
**Fox News:** "Is Big Tech going to be investigated once Republicans take the House?"
**Steve Scalise: "Absolutely... We told the Big Tech companies: SAVE YOUR DOCUMENTS!"**
* * *
Hello Friend,
This is Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.
I was just on national television to assure the American People that House Republicans will investigate Big Tech censorship top to bottom -- including the Hunter Biden laptop scandal!

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Protecting the right to marry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BH3g3Rut87EGedDzBSi6_kD-z9gaeHmSmXHrrjC3mFU=/fwBYDrl8-K8fOCcW0v-u_34_6m3R3QOYJBfEaLWi8k0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20221214-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Yesterday was a good day for families across the country because President Biden signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law!

In the wake of the _Dobbs_ decision, which overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , it has become all too clear that rights previously affirmed by the Supreme Court may be under threat - among them same-sex marriage and interracial marriage.

To address this threat, I proudly voted for the Respect for Marriage Act to protect same-sex and interracial marriages under federal law. President Biden signed the bill yesterday, and now couples and families across our country have the peace of mind of knowing that their marriages are protected and respected under federal law.

Thank you to the tireless advocates who have helped make this day possible.

Abigail

body:
CONGRATULATIONS! >>
| **BREAKING: Senator Raphael Warnock WINS Georgia Runoff, protecting Senate Majority for Democrats** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for Democrats and our Senate majority, so we 're sending Warnock a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him!** [**We 're sending this letter to his office at 8 am tomorrow - so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37581?t=6&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37581?t=7&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37581?t=8&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC)
---
TO: Senator Raphael Warnock
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Sen. Warnock - CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out you soared to re-election &Nbsp;victory!**

Georgia is a key battleground state that was absolutely _essential_ for Democrats to hold and expand our fragile Senate majority.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremist Herschel Walker and the MAGA mob 's vicious attacks wasn't easy -- especially in such a close race.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That 's why I'm signing this card and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding victory and to continue to elect incredible Senate Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37581?t=9&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37581?t=10&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37581?t=11&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5840%2E878179%2Et9rbJC)

**FLASHBACK**

**The Night Before The Botched Election**

We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned.

"We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?"

-Kari lake

We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls.

**It was worse than we could have ever imagined.**

Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it’s only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself.

We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game — and we need to be ready for the long haul.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Another study shows…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Paid leave is good for families and smart economic policy.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15550%2E3422442%2EEU4ynk)
**Derek, a new study shows that access to paid family leave reduces the likelihood that a woman leaves her job if her spouse has serious health issues.** It’s clear that California’s paid leave program keeps women from leaving the workforce.
This fall, Katie urged Governor Newsom to sign a bill that will allow lower income workers to receive 90% of their normal paycheck if they need to take leave, an increase from the current benefit of 60-70%. We celebrated when this bill was signed into law, but California is in the minority. The vast majority of states don’t have any sort of paid family leave program, which is why Katie has pushed for action at the federal level.
Paid leave—whether you’re using it to care for a sick family member or to bond with a new child, doesn’t just benefit families who take leave. **Supporting workers and enabling them to stay in our workforce helps support a strong, stable, globally competitive economy.**
Thanks for reading,
Team KP
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE14_PAI_20221214_V1_F&t=2&akid=15550%2E3422442%2EEU4ynk)**

body:

We’ve accomplished a lot already — addressing the climate crisis, passing nationwide protections for marriage equality, and investing in our nation’s infrastructure — but our work is far from over. Will you take our year-end survey? | Hi team, With the final Senate election officially over, I’m looking forward to getting back to work in Washington. We’ve accomplished a lot already — addressing the climate crisis, passing nationwide protections for marriage equality, and investing in our nation’s infrastructure — but our work is far from over. That’s why I am reaching out to key supporters, like you, to see what issues and challenges are on your mind. I want to make sure your priorities are at the top of my list in the weeks and months ahead. | When you helped re-elect me, you placed your trust in me to speak for you and fight for you in Washington. That’s why it’s so important to me and my team that we know exactly what challenges you’re facing — and what hopes you have for the future. While I wish I could speak personally with every member of this team, we’ll have to use the next best thing, so my team created this exclusive End of Year Priorities survey. This letter is filling up fast, so we’re reaching out directly to you, Peter!

body:
Preparation means being ready on day one.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221214-1-vsp&t=1&akid=223%2E734936%2EXTJq6d)
Peter -
Monday night on Chris Hayes, Ruben was asked if he was going to run against Senator Sinema and he made it clear: “I am a Marine and Marines prepare. That’s what I am doing right now.”
Preparation means being ready on day one.
Preparation means having the resources to run a winning campaign and withstand attacks on day one.
Because if Ruben runs, the moment he gets in the race he is going to get pummeled with attacks from the monied-interests supporting Senator Sinema.
That’s why we’re asking for donations today. Because if Ruben runs, it wouldn’t be to make a statement or send a message.
Ruben would be running to win.
But he can’t do that without you. We have to be prepared. So please:
[**Can you make your first online $3 contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Arizona today? We would not be asking this often if it were not so critically important right now.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221214-1-vsp&t=2&akid=223%2E734936%2EXTJq6d)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a417fb2099e4dc49db5c06f37058fc5&_e=B34WuTB6ZUYd3rF9ENaGa0bAa6IR0fyPi2oUFl-x30s7ikXauSNFh2bFhDwXqAxuPr5aGxFOS_XDREZDRUcIcK0e9TUEqWWVZuscKVVLIayP9CAZw3-rEtFKYLgb7txAjnd60Zee9PmTEoDl4ggjBtMblCXbxbeHwlpITSUCH9RPb6Azs27Shy_yuEy4h5GO9jbOeqsowGKnl2Z8kkaZC8-3aabX2lahgDTg04KTrWlASpZw1QCcCrViU-VK6lxKRQ_hl-2Fl8x0kpfsdUPt-w9GNt5DKpcu2eTBkAISgoCXgMIFAsEX88Zp6flnFhYy7D41H6yVCOcS3GVNMYfGGeJabDPvZ1bseg4VnMnP35_04Qml2vcB4Y2tI8bct4tb)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* >From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a417fb2099e4dc49db5c06f37058fc5&_e=B34WuTB6ZUYd3rF9ENaGa0bAa6IR0fyPi2oUFl-x30s7ikXauSNFh2bFhDwXqAxuPr5aGxFOS_XDREZDRUcIcK0e9TUEqWWVZuscKVVLIayP9CAZw3-rEtFKYLgb7txAjnd60Zee9PmTEoDl4ggjBtMblCXbxbeHwlpITSUCH9RPb6Azs27Shy_yuEy4h5GO9jbOeqsowGKnl2Z8kkaZC8-3aabX2lahgDTg04KTrWm88QGOC4ZlHyWDaoGKCIId0gsPBQx7WBPWMpRpVpBiRJab12Lr3b7v4Bj2L2rKStr09W2gxUNhz13wF7iS9eFDOv76ws4ja6RryskS__F7SJIaDbhhwx-qXcpON4tZt9FuQTjzSuikEsGYqV3p-6F6)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a417fb2099e4dc49db5c06f37058fc5&_e=B34WuTB6ZUYd3rF9ENaGa0bAa6IR0fyPi2oUFl-x30s7ikXauSNFh2bFhDwXqAxuPr5aGxFOS_XDREZDRUcIcK0e9TUEqWWVZuscKVVLIayP9CAZw3-rEtFKYLgb7txAjnd60Zee9PmTEoDl4ggjBtMblCXbxbeHwlpITSUCH9RPb6Azs27Shy_yuEy4h5GO9jbOeqsowGKnl2Z8kkaZC8-3aabX2lahgDTg04KTrWmJxxcoH5UfA9sBauCdSWUU6MWXUtXn6Dt25nAc0pUhVoKBh-eoPOsv1Z4ecqjCSN-ykN24tZBqdIz5EvkAd8N1FjchEOHTgNevJlkHlsC65JnpXT3DVjWdnzyvHcRDXKqbjw7VKsab7P_z-ho9RNy-)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a417fb2099e4dc49db5c06f37058fc5&_e=B34WuTB6ZUYd3rF9ENaGa0bAa6IR0fyPi2oUFl-x30s7ikXauSNFh2bFhDwXqAxuPr5aGxFOS_XDREZDRUcIcK0e9TUEqWWVZuscKVVLIayP9CAZw3-rEtFKYLgb7txAjnd60Zee9PmTEoDl4ggjBtMblCXbxbeHwlpITSUCH9RPb6Azs27Shy_yuEy4h5GO9jbOeqsowGKnl2Z8kkaZC8-3aabX2lahgDTg04KTrWkSYUoqrjIcfFEfY25CkG5UyLItrsvIAQL9tf1HyN-xjZnosd2-jpFR1Y-b7ZPBn9PKjtC-ZlWH1_6l9-OAzO9afGFWJMWlfNyj2sxOURlalbADt7XEvuyVitsodoNpjJVrA9sq7XTa4LH-66Mm3yT2) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bcf3ec7dd464ef4975cd372c0e3eafe&_e=tcwZ1VwB3T4L2l62h2VxLzWJnmIPfZ4yBL1kFgYbwtC9J_UfofQXWtVppSsC5jQZjlyw9SToVHNyb0ZNDJbuWKShiYvgPSUvxaMxOm7ubYN8pdt35C5HGUgsak49uRY0CxXkaJd1Xdi1SyoM1sfSYHoI5-m0gXbkoACoxipAKBnn4j-OU3trW2_ArWYeoFxJ2k06h2iwIYk7vllU0pWDSUBMYd11JXdV5GzmtcbNBC6D2Yso0iE5oTuGZlbDdISNym6nywLAOLeZE89LzoHaKVxs_D7GEhRQKYR8w0FzLkl7WyfshS3uMMe7tXQpLQFfi9lC8xoVooN61s6H2nguRrUWw1tjrZ8gXGsYNM55BoKB8l7g2mq87Nrloy0FVzK9m6N4NgE8re0oCbsQCVM4Tg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bcf3ec7dd464ef4975cd372c0e3eafe&_e=tcwZ1VwB3T4L2l62h2VxLzWJnmIPfZ4yBL1kFgYbwtC9J_UfofQXWtVppSsC5jQZjlyw9SToVHNyb0ZNDJbuWKShiYvgPSUvxaMxOm7ubYN8pdt35C5HGUgsak49uRY0CxXkaJd1Xdi1SyoM1sfSYHoI5-m0gXbkoACoxipAKBnn4j-OU3trW2_ArWYeoFxJ2k06h2iwIYk7vllU0pWDSUBMYd11JXdV5GzmtcbNBC6D2Yso0iE5oTuGZlbDdISNTf5658xRIwo6udS6oOAELhQZ34quQwnPVp4_jj2zjOYNbEM-ITkpIaaRNsQLdv-J7dKm1j3FlVHbrXPLi2Cd1xrlZWeOEApRbOzatGM6Htp26oMYnUUcd4rq-jToNleR5wUEON1P8YRvXUgVqLWTOw%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4bcf3ec7dd464ef4975cd372c0e3eafe&_e=tcwZ1VwB3T4L2l62h2VxLzWJnmIPfZ4yBL1kFgYbwtC9J_UfofQXWtVppSsC5jQZjlyw9SToVHNyb0ZNDJbuWKShiYvgPSUvxaMxOm7ubYN8pdt35C5HGUgsak49uRY0CxXkaJd1Xdi1SyoM1sfSYHoI5-m0gXbkoACoxipAKBnn4j-OU3trW2_ArWYeoFxJ2k06h2iwIYk7vllU0pWDSUBMYd11JXdV5GzmtcbNBC6D2Yso0iE5oTuGZlbDdISNoslWfjpOMoujMYfFyF4bvRRdNEps2gwFStz-OfGjt5SKVNBbwWlAxuALBBqjLSCJo3gNMm8IpOhmKUdcdjJSTqCMsRhnBBWdQJy3G5lhnff7H0OHFkNlQdhnXO6UORrDmOo7brcMRX6jVv-ivPjtFA%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Brett Broesder
subject: Sharing results with you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55953992/383395332/390144955?source=DS_EM_SV_OP_221214_1_3&refcode2=39e58a7b-d97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&contactdata=6eC9LxXviEe2IOtzzaoo24/OrkyAI5rM1C5aa/kiHXCILv4sCpG6cy7PVr5r2RZnfpwr6hdF8ewC5NKllAX3WQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5ZTU4YTdiLWQ5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NrEqNfXwbFDYpxJ6SEHQPJIYk3bYLORANMMSL8NKBjc=)
---
Peter,

Last week, we asked you to participate in a brief survey to gauge the top priorities Democrats should focus on as we enter 2023.

I’m so grateful to everyone who submitted a response – the information we gather from this survey will help guide Democrats Serve as we continue to support Democrats with public service backgrounds in 2023 and beyond.

I want to share some key findings from the survey:
* **81% of you believe curbing gun violence should be a top priority for Democrats.** We know that elected officials with a background in public service have a unique perspective on the impact of gun violence on our communities, and we need more of their voices in office to advocate for this issue.
* **Protecting voting rights is another top issue.** We’ve watched in recent years as GOP legislatures and state officials rig the system to suppress the voices of voters, especially marginalized voters. We urgently need to support public service pros who will fight to make every voice heard in our democracy.
* **Many of you are also concerned about the future of our democracy and holding bad actors accountable.** After an election with more right-wing extremist candidates than ever before, Democrats Serve is committed to supporting candidates who will safeguard our fundamental freedoms.

[If you didn’t get a chance to submit a response to our survey yet, I encourage you to do so!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55953997/383395333/-872979958?source=DS_EM_SV_OP_221214_1_3&refcode2=39e58a7b-d97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&contactdata=6eC9LxXviEe2IOtzzaoo24/OrkyAI5rM1C5aa/kiHXCILv4sCpG6cy7PVr5r2RZnfpwr6hdF8ewC5NKllAX3WQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5ZTU4YTdiLWQ5N2ItZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NrEqNfXwbFDYpxJ6SEHQPJIYk3bYLORANMMSL8NKBjc=&emci=33e58a7b-d97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=39e58a7b-d97b-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=10067282) Hearing from our supporters is important as we look ahead to the coming years.

Thank you again,

Brett Broesder

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Our deadline is tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

subject: My son, Mark...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I'm so proud of my son.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55974299/383433114/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzc5MDI0Yi0wNDdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGetosHqa9ttLrtAFobAfe0nQHcbegp3I3I29NC2JvE=)
---
Peter,

My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work.

**But that work is at risk.** That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat.

Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way.

Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more.

**But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. I know that good Democrats like you and Mark can make a difference.**

[**Peter, Mark has a huge fundraising deadline tomorrow and he still needs to raise $3,000. clean_body: I'm so proud of my son. | = Peter, My name is Willie Takano – Mark’s dad. I’m so proud of my son and everything he’s accomplished – but I know he didn’t do it alone. It’s because of each of you, his supporters, that have helped him get elected to Congress where he has been able to do so much good work. But that work is at risk. That’s because he’s behind on his fundraising goals and Republicans are eager to overtake his seat. Look, I’ve seen America’s dark side before. When I was young, my family was forced into a Japanese American internment camp. Those were hard days. But since then, we’ve come a long way. Now, I worry about that dark side emerging again. Extremist Republicans have spread hateful rhetoric and anti-Asian sentiment has reared its head once more. But seeing my son fighting for progress and justice as a lawmaker gives me hope. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: These numbers are shocking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent appeal.
#
Peter,
I’m writing to you today with an urgent appeal. While our progressive coalition has been fighting to pass more life-saving policies before time runs out on this session of Congress, my team has been hard at work ensuring all of our operations are running smoothly.
But I just had a conversation with my team — they’re very worried, Peter, and so am I. As it turns out, our fundraising has dramatically declined in the past year **_and we can’t sustain this pace any longer._**
Here’s the breakdown I got from my team. See for yourself:
**Time Period** | **Amount**
---|---
Quarter 4 2022: | $101,414
Quarter 4 2021: | $283,687
**Difference:** | **–$182,273**
[**It’s clear that we have to make up the difference as soon as possible, and that will only be possible if supporters like you chip in. Please Peter — trust I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. Can you donate $3 or any amount to help?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25235?refcode=em20221214-1954&t=1&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25235?refcode=em20221214-1954&t=20&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)**
We’ve lost out on over $180,000 in the last year because our fundraising has slowed down so dramatically. And yet in that time, our progressive bloc has helped secure historic, transformative legislation that will change all of our lives for the better.
It has never been more important that we sustain our work for the long-term — we know now that we CAN pass our progressive agenda, but we’re also facing a GOP-controlled House. **That’s why it is that much more important that we build up our resources now, get our fundraising back on track, and enter 2023 in a stronger position.**
[**What do you say, Peter — will you chip in $3 or more right now to help us reverse this downward trend and rebuild our resources from the ground up?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25235?refcode=em20221214-1954&t=21&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)
I believe in the strength of our grassroots movement. Since I’ve had the privilege of fighting for you in Congress, we’ve moved mountains together. But I can only continue to do that work and lead our Progressive Caucus with the assurance that our work will be sustained for the long-term.
**If we keep losing out on critical funds at this rate, we’ll be in a very serious situation.[I’m asking for your support today because it’s made a true difference at times when we needed it most, and I hope you’ll consider contributing now. Remember, any amount at all helps.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25235?refcode=em20221214-1954&t=22&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221214-1954-footer&t=23&refcode2=1954_420207_rdivEi&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1954%2E420207%2ErdivEi)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

NOW: We must use these last few weeks with our House Majority to hold Republicans accountable for their continued bad behavior and dangerous rhetoric on the deadly January 6th attack. = | = Make no mistake; when Kevin McCarthy, Jim Jordan, and Marjorie Taylor-Greene become the Majority party in the House, they will only ramp up their hateful rhetoric. They will stop at nothing to continue peddling the Big Lie and are lining up dutifully behind Trump. We cannot let this go without a fight, team. Can you help us correct the record while we still can?= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your commitment to this fight, Team Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. | | = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. body:

Already, December is nearly halfway over, and before we know it we will be heading into 2023! After a successful midterm election, I know it can be hard to stay engaged. But team, our work is not over yet – Republicans have control of the House, and you can bet that they will be using every piece of momentum they have to push their radical agenda through.**We need to be prepared for whatever they throw our way, so as we approach our mid-month deadline, I need your help to raise $1,000.** I know that during the holiday season, this goal might be a challenge, but the support you give now sets us up for success heading into the new year. Combatting these upcoming challenges means we need to stay ready, and any amount you give will make sure we have all the resources necessary to advocate and defend the rights of Delawareans. **[This is not the time to rest on our laurels. I am planning on maintaining the momentum we created to carry us strongly through 2023, but I need your help to reach our _last_ mid-month goal of 2022. Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to push us past the finish line and make the best of what little time we have left in 2022? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55975412/383447510/-1986161712?refcode=EM_FR_221214MM_FR_LBR_90DO_NG_TESTB_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjIzNjMzNi0wZjdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vIXiiU9PXYeSHGn6MhVX7xnL6Hql-CplsUm_dBdHQWU=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55975413/383447511/-1986161712?refcode=EM_FR_221214MM_FR_LBR_90DO_NG_TESTB_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjIzNjMzNi0wZjdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vIXiiU9PXYeSHGn6MhVX7xnL6Hql-CplsUm_dBdHQWU=) We have to be ready to defend our progress. Extremist Republicans won’t hesitate to challenge access to healthcare, voting rights, reproductive rights, and so much more in this coming year. That means we need to keep our efforts strong to show the GOP that we are not going anywhere. **[We held off the red wave once, and there is no doubt in my mind that we can do it again. We have taken so many strides forward, and I do not plan on looking back. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7425046f320a45e9a34ee3b1d680bb25&_e=t97UWJS-NdAxA_dqf_5ffFBcowMDFLqav8spy9DhfoXPeu7Qk1410FZicbmDmwxZVh7nLMWSkccJLU2YFwTlBwyZeklBMsEqRbYQnRExWjfCocwHdy6DOMl7xiE0f1eRiOlBTokftVhgg-uLcbyatb9OyJigNzozv1aeUB9yKhnKsr1n57-8wE0d65I33280LsT6olwxxs7ea83pxr9bXGuOuJnigQQD-hXDIx63jRnPvRe9BGBzi6LTfcYGnuQAa7P_TsBOzUX9sJ3CwsjOR0ty2FBxukKoLIdkoHepiVElwQ0jUFYdjD8VsMblK_0AuhfrhqITKm619lczp29lSuV1hbMs8xcqWsRl_NJUn9kv1-5mKY4BY77MIDG0_37T)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7425046f320a45e9a34ee3b1d680bb25&_e=t97UWJS-NdAxA_dqf_5ffFBcowMDFLqav8spy9DhfoXPeu7Qk1410FZicbmDmwxZVh7nLMWSkccJLU2YFwTlBwyZeklBMsEqRbYQnRExWjfCocwHdy6DOMl7xiE0f1eRiOlBTokftVhgg-uLcbyatb9OyJigNzozv1aeUB9yKhnKsr1n57-8wE0d65I33280LsT6olwxxs7ea83pxr9bXGuOuJnigQQD-hXDIx63jRm4yEp8jfA6YYSFMo70ZjpP9tqphsUl_T_ouuMTS8oCwA1ouYkw0A6Ras7QUv_CpW09HdebVpxnzf-XLatv9wKEnIEJZ6kVLtVv6Q-qIMcEcZWaJeTxpyT-tnrzNAv9PZLqSIkxHo3Drq_vbw-k_2MF)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7425046f320a45e9a34ee3b1d680bb25&_e=t97UWJS-NdAxA_dqf_5ffFBcowMDFLqav8spy9DhfoXPeu7Qk1410FZicbmDmwxZVh7nLMWSkccJLU2YFwTlBwyZeklBMsEqRbYQnRExWjfCocwHdy6DOMl7xiE0f1eRiOlBTokftVhgg-uLcbyatb9OyJigNzozv1aeUB9yKhnKsr1n57-8wE0d65I33280LsT6olwxxs7ea83pxr9bXGuOuJnigQQD-hXDIx63jRnIfMbIYEm3qacyWJ1FzHj-pJB2FDs1uJTFBxhielmliMC4Be2MC8DWzjyQapHYkbBqrC0WkEjBhej2NmesP9MGp1SaCyFkOxsYTJPIRp5UnktJdcwxsLgKK1OhxSRuGOA81Bo5dQnqIvjKwoU1bN7r)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7425046f320a45e9a34ee3b1d680bb25&_e=t97UWJS-NdAxA_dqf_5ffFBcowMDFLqav8spy9DhfoXPeu7Qk1410FZicbmDmwxZVh7nLMWSkccJLU2YFwTlBwyZeklBMsEqRbYQnRExWjfCocwHdy6DOMl7xiE0f1eRiOlBTokftVhgg-uLcbyatb9OyJigNzozv1aeUB9yKhnKsr1n57-8wE0d65I33280LsT6olwxxs7ea83pxr9bXGuOuJnigQQD-hXDIx63jRnD0goah3bzIjcLxAbzMjVejhtlspuDra5mOYX0YvYSDbJEsmG7pYdVf_Tgu30UnzYSbIZiqEUyzG-fNXRNCr1QO2l5WiH4Z0f2fs9h-nFS6pZEwSigCg_L9bN50aib3vckH6b4AvVA9IeJDcsuIHhz) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

subject: Sign and send the petition to President Biden: Get rid of Louis DeJoy and expand postal services now!
body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b464015-231c-46e0-bbbc-62a3b1ccf501/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

---
| | | | | Dear Peter, **[Sign and send the petition to President Biden: Get rid of Louis DeJoy and expand postal services now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06ba9b36-f584-4945-8cc3-fd2e78e70d2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The United States Postal Service continues to languish under Trump-holdover Postmaster General Louis DeJoy’s failing leadership. To oust DeJoy, we must have a USPS Board of Governors who is willing to do just that and work towards saving one of our most beloved institutions. Only the USPS Board can fire DeJoy, and that’s exactly what they should do after his numerous failings, conflicts of interest, attempts to [obstruct](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd23a37-8e3d-4ada-82fb-938495bc9352/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) vote-by-mail, and destructive leadership. **There are two vacancies slated to open on the Postal Board this December, and President Joe Biden will have the opportunity to appoint governors who will stand up to DeJoy’s destructive leadership and advocate strongly for the expansion of USPS services.**
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f3b4678-fe3a-41e5-874c-b1700ac327b8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | President Biden must make sure the next two nominations to the Postal Board of Governors are up to the task of firing the Postmaster General and understand that the USPS has always been, and should remain, a cherished public service. [**Sign and send the petition to President Biden: Nominate the final two members of the USPS Board of Governors needed to fire Louis DeJoy and expand postal services.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td84a34ee-3e66-4b24-93e5-4fd05887e1f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Billionaires bankrolling elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We saw a lot this cycle. While we’re proud to send Greg Casar and Summer
Lee to Congress, the reality is that several of our groundbreaking
candidates were kept from joining the Squad by a relentless torrent of
outside spending.

Sam Bankman-Fried, a crypto-billionaire, poured tens of millions of
dollars into establishment Democratic campaigns this cycle. While the
Democratic establishment embraced his big money, he hid behind PACs to
take down two Justice Democrats — Jessica Cisneros and Nina Turner.

Sam Bankman-Fried spent millions of dollars to defeat two progressive
women of color who unapologetically fight for working people. This is
nothing new, but now progressives like us are organized and we’ve shown
the establishment that our candidates can and will win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123130?refcode=em20221214-26552&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u ]We know exactly what they’ll throw at us next cycle — billionaires,
AIPAC, the establishment — and it’s supporters like you that keep our
fight going. Will you rush a donation today so we can prepare to protect
our next Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123130?refcode=em20221214-26552&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u ]Contribute $3

While Nina and Jessica were organizing in their communities for change,
crypto-billionaire Saml Bankman-Fried hid behind his money and backed
corporate, conservative incumbents like Henry Cuellar — the most
anti-abortion Democrat in the House.

Now, this billionaire has openly admitted he donated tens of millions more
to Republican candidates, and he’s been arrested for fraud, money
laundering, and campaign finance violations. It’s no surprise to us when
billionaires and far-right groups show their true colors — putting their
profits and interests above democracy.

Corporate mega-donors have too much at stake to allow Justice Democrats to
take power in Congress. We threaten the status quo, and that scares them.
But the fact remains that in too many races, money wins out in the end.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123130?refcode=em20221214-26552&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u ]We won’t be intimidated by big money, but your donation helps us stand
strong against its influence. Can you donate $3 — or any
amount — to help us prepare for the next cycle?

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221214-26552-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26552_1203867_GnSB5u&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26552%2E1203867%2EGnSB5u

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We saw a lot this cycle. While we’re proud to send Greg Casar and Summer Lee to Congress, the reality is that several of our groundbreaking candidates were kept from joining the Squad by a relentless torrent of outside spending. Sam Bankman-Fried, a crypto-billionaire, poured tens of millions of dollars into establishment Democratic campaigns this cycle. While the Democratic establishment embraced his big money, he hid behind PACs to take down two Justice Democrats — Jessica Cisneros and Nina Turner. Sam Bankman-Fried spent millions of dollars to defeat two progressive women of color who unapologetically fight for working people. This is nothing new, but now progressives like us are organized and we’ve shown the establishment that our candidates can and will win. [ ]We know exactly what they’ll throw at us next cycle — billionaires, AIPAC, the establishment — and it’s supporters like you that keep our fight going. Will you rush a donation today so we can prepare to protect our next Justice Democrats? [ ]Contribute $3 While Nina and Jessica were organizing in their communities for change, crypto-billionaire Saml Bankman-Fried hid behind his money and backed corporate, conservative incumbents like Henry Cuellar — the most anti-abortion Democrat in the House. Now, this billionaire has openly admitted he donated tens of millions more to Republican candidates, and he’s been arrested for fraud, money laundering, and campaign finance violations. It’s no surprise to us when billionaires and far-right groups show their true colors — putting their profits and interests above democracy. Corporate mega-donors have too much at stake to allow Justice Democrats to take power in Congress. We threaten the status quo, and that scares them. But the fact remains that in too many races, money wins out in the end. [ ]We won’t be intimidated by big money, but your donation helps us stand strong against its influence. Can you donate $3 — or any amount — to help us prepare for the next cycle? In solidarity, Team JD Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leon=20Benjamin?=
subject: We have one more House race in this cycle
body:
| | | **VA-4 (OUR RACE) is now the

LAST House Race of this Congress...

THAT IS OURS TO WIN!**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7812821e09&e=fdefed58de)
Peter,**Let's face the facts; the Red Wave flopped. They were saying 40-60 seat majority in the House. 60! Well, now it is just a handful of seats, but ONE RACE IS UNDECIDED. Our race has a vacancy in our**[**SLIM MAJORITY**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ebf38059af&e=fdefed58de)**in the House that needs filling.****My race, my community, VA-4, has no voice in Washington. Our communities are hopeless and deserve a voice. I ran and with no RNC support, and no House support, I nearly won.**[**Now is our chance to liberate this district from the grasp of freedom suppression.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b4b3086a5b&e=fdefed58de)
**Freedom from their Democrat plantation is a scary thing, but like myself, I WILL liberate my community.**[ Help me REPLACE WHAT THEY STOLE! RUSH $50, $100, $150!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fe8e2668a4&e=fdefed58de)[**Americans are waking up to the lies, and the Left is desperate! Chip in NOW- $25, $50, $100!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5ad0ff3737&e=fdefed58de)
| [HELP ME LIBERATE THE BLACK COMMUNITY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6a7ef5dd31&e=fdefed58de)
---
**As a Navy Combat Veteran, I served this country and the American people. Now I’m running for Congress as the GOP Nominee for VA-4 to serve again!****While the Left works to destroy our free speech, right to bear arms, and civil liberties, I’m organizing a grassroots campaign team like NEVER SEEN BEFORE.****The Left is SCARED and is pumping dark money into my opponent's campaign. LIKE CRAZY! I need your help; I need reinforcements. I’m tired of We The People being neglected by those in office with the privilege of serving us. They have a sense of political entitlement that is truly sick and wrong.**
| [HELP LEON TAKE BACK AMERICA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dfe295b1a8&e=fdefed58de)
---
**My name is Leon Benjamin, and I’m running for Congress as a BLACK Conservative Republican... because I’m sick of what the far Left has done to my community and to American families. I’m a husband, father, and pastor.

I owe it to my congregation and my family to build a better future. These days we need to fight for them even to have a future.****I didn't serve this country to see it burned to the ground by BLM anarchists or tassel loafer-wearing government bureaucrats. I served to defend our constitution. Defend our liberties. Defend our people, or die trying.**
| [HELP LEON SERVE THE PEOPLE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e80d41f015&e=fdefed58de)
---
**Patriot, I’ve spent my entire life serving my community and serving our nation.****I’m a Navy Combat Veteran, Small Business Owner, and Senior Pastor and Bishop at my church. I even helped create President Trump’s Faith-Based Initiative back in 2016.****I’m up against a proxy-voting DC sellout who sells out Christianity and the black community at every SECOND!**
| [LET’S FIGHT FOR THIS COUNTRY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0bd9597003&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**Now, polling shows what we already know. The Left, which claims to serve the marginalized and minority communities, is the party culpable for the “serious financial problems” from inflation.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b4cd630afd&e=fdefed58de)

**If the Left really cared about the Black community, as President Trump does, then we would have seen greater action decades ago as we saw in the last administration. It’s time the Left learned that conservative principles and conservative values ARE BLACK VALUES.****BLM and Antifa are more focused on destroying our communities and burning them down than fighting issues affecting us like inflation, high gas prices, or higher consumer prices. They are hateful, destructive, and out of touch.**
| [HELP ME DEFEAT BLM AND ANTIFA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5c878013c4&e=fdefed58de)
---
**This is a special election and this is our moment to increase our House majority to get some REAL results for the people. Can you help me?****God bless you, your families, and God bless America. The country we know, love, and must protect.**

**Your Friend in Christ,****Leon Benjamin**
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

Our mailing address is:
American Conservatives United1900 Market StPhiladelphia, PA 19103
[Add us to your address book](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40&e=fdefed58de&c=f7efc6d20e) or [unsubscribe](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40&e=fdefed58de&c=f7efc6d20e)

body:

**[It’s _crucial_ that we have the resources to compete with McConnell’s megadonors. Rush $5 _before midnight_ to elect Senate Democrats and protect our _razor-thin_ Senate majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221214-DemocraticHQ-20to24FTNArc-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221214-DemocraticHQ-20to24FTNArc-ETG-sl1&akid=9179%2E9716520%2EeDueLQ)**

---

This grassroots team has _MADE HISTORY AGAIN,_ but we can’t afford to let up:

**First:** We flipped the Senate last cycle, securing a _critical_ Democratic majority for the Biden-Harris administration.

**Then:** We defied all expectations this year and EXPANDED our razor-thin Senate majority!

**BUT NOW:** Mitch McConnell is seething, and he's already gearing up to spend millions to take back control. **We need to start laying the groundwork for victory in 2024 NOW.**

****We can’t wait around and let Mitch McConnell bury us with megadonor cash. To fight back, we need 5,000 Democrats to step up immediately! So please, before midnight:

name: Add Your Name (Left Action)
subject: He urged Trump to declare "Marshall Law". Kick him out of Congress NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Demand Expulsion of Congressman who called for Trump to declare "Marshall Law"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67801eed-bd30-4743-a4bc-0eb1d0712bb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T561a01f9-2ec3-4ccb-bd1e-975122d91f0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action? Forward this email to friends so we can make as big an impact as possible! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom)_ **[It was a naked attempt to overthrow our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b8b1a68-f259-4108-92c9-846559e5e599/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Just days before Joe Biden was to be inaugurated, Representative Ralph Norman (R-SC) texted Trump's chief of staff with the following:

_" Our LAST HOPE is invoking Marshall Law!! PLEASE URGE TO PRESIDENT TO DO SO!!" ([Source: TPM](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2983266-7c04-4e4c-b2b5-5bbb8b9ab180/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_

**Norman has absolutely no business being in Congress. He must be kicked out of Congress immediately.** The House has the power to do it through a 2/3 vote, meaning it wouldn't even take a majority of Republicans to do it.

This needs to happen NOW, and if Republicans in the House won't do it, they need to hear from us over and over again -- **and louder and louder each time** \-- until they do.

[**Add your name now, demand that Norman be kicked out, and get others to do it as well, so our collective voice is as loud as possible.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff93a161-0a28-4dc3-a7eb-c6243d72137e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

body:
But in order to get a good understanding of each state’s priorities, we need supporters from every state (including yours!) to respond today. | | |
---
| | Here at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, the core of our work is electing Democratic state legislators in all 50 states. Last month, we had the best Election Day for the president’s party since at least 1934 – and we were only able to do it with the help of our grassroots supporters. But there’re no days off when it comes to this work – right now, we’re beginning to develop our strategy for 2023, 2024, and beyond – so we’re coming to you today. **In order to get a clear picture of the issues that our supporters care most about, we need people from _every_ state (including yours!) to respond today. ** | **2022 LOCAL PRIORITIES SURVEY**

clean_body: But in order to get a good understanding of each state’s priorities, we need supporters from every state (including yours!) to respond today. | | | | | Here at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, the core of our work is electing Democratic state legislators in all 50 states. Last month, we had the best Election Day for the president’s party since at least 1934 – and we were only able to do it with the help of our grassroots supporters. But there’re no days off when it comes to this work – right now, we’re beginning to develop our strategy for 2023, 2024, and beyond – so we’re coming to you today. In order to get a clear picture of the issues that our supporters care most about, we need people from every state (including yours!) to respond today. | 2022 LOCAL PRIORITIES SURVEY Date: 12.14.2022 Supporter: Representing: Local Democrats Response:Pending Your participation is crucial – your responses will help us determine what issues are important to Democrats in your area and where our efforts are best focused. Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Under twenty bucks. No, seriously.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The House election was extremely close. Democrats could only afford to lose 5 seats, and now, it appears that Republicans will have to defend the same razor-thin majority in 2024. Winning back the House and defending the White House and Senate are entirely within reach.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
$18.16, Derek.
That’s the average contribution to our campaign this fundraising quarter. It’s a special number, and I want to take a moment to tell you why.
$18.16 represents a nationwide movement of grassroots Democrats standing up for our democracy. There’s true power in grassroots support; we have proved that $5, $10, and $18.16 at a time, we have the power — _together_ — to rival even the highest-spending Republican super PACs and billionaires.
These grassroots dollars gave us the resources to stop the Republican red wave with an expanded Senate majority and the strongest midterm House defense during a Democratic administration since John F. Kennedy.
And in just four weeks, you raised Rev. Warnock over $515,000 to beat back Republican efforts to defeat him.
**[Derek, in another moment, I’ll tell you about everything we’ve accomplished thanks to this team’s grassroots support, but first, will you pitch in $18.16 now to make our movement even stronger?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1524?c0=dec2022_abs_em.qgP3Q1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)**
[DONATE $18.16](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1524?c0=dec2022_abs_em.qgP3Q1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
Democrats helped small businesses and working families survive the pandemic with the _American Rescue Plan_. We cut child poverty nearly in half with one of the largest middle class tax cuts in recent memory.
We took on the NRA and expanded background checks for gun purchasers under 21. We cracked down on gun trafficking and strawman purchases. We closed the boyfriend loophole to keep guns out of the hands of domestic abusers.
We took on Big Pharma and capped the out-of-pocket cost of prescription drugs, ensuring that no one on Medicare will pay more than $35 for insulin.
We took on the fossil fuel industry to cut emissions by 40 percent by 2030 with the largest investment in green jobs and clean energy in history.
We created jobs by passing the largest infrastructure bill since Eisenhower. Then we created even more with legislation to boost semiconductor manufacturing jobs here in the United States.
**The House election was extremely close. Democrats could only afford to lose 5 seats, and now, it appears that Republicans will have to defend the same razor-thin majority in 2024. Winning back the House and defending the White House and Senate are entirely within reach.**
But I need your support to take on Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, and Jim Jordan. They are not fit to lead our country.
**[Can you chip in $18.16 or whatever you can spare to finish this fundraising quarter strong and ensure we have the resources to respond to Kevin McCarthy’s next two years of chaos and attacks?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1524?c0=dec2022_abs_em.qgP3Q1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2022_abs_em.1CmCse&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $18.16](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1532?c0=dec2022_abs_em.xxiAcs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=dec2022_abs_em.IT0Q1v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2022_abs_em.pdjp7M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=dec2022_abs_em.n-QQjE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20221214_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=12&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
---
Our work in this Congress is not yet done. We need to reinstate the Child Tax Credit, as child poverty is back on the rise after the _American Rescue Plan_ funding expired.
We need to deliver a pathway to citizenship for Dreamers, as court rulings put the DACA program increasingly in jeopardy.
We need to take action now to ensure President Biden’s next two years are as successful as the last two.
I am spending every moment between now and January doing everything I can to ensure that Democrats are delivering for the American people.
Thank you for being an important part of our work.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1447%2E5257348%2E9YvSUz)
