name: Team DPVA
subject: No Off Season in Virginia Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
In Virginia this year, the flood of Special Elections should keep us all on our toes.

|
---
Derek, In Virginia politics, there’s usually an “off season.” Between the General Election in November and the start of the General Assembly session in January, most political organizations in the Commonwealth are able to take a breather – but not this year. With special elections scheduled for the House of Delegates in **HD-35** , the Virginia Senate in **SD-07** , and U.S. House of Representatives in **VA-04** , there’s not a moment to rest here in Virginia. These races will determine whether Democrats are able to advance meaningful progress over the next few years, or whether the GOP will be able to grind our progress to a halt – or even reverse it. subject: Details of Mohave County, AZ Lawsuit
body:
True the Vote is proud to support Mohave County voters in their fight for fair elections | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/51a90d3f2a70/live-tonight-how-the-ccp-is-breaching-us-elections-7233352?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=67c8b12f7d&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| **Maricopa County Experimented with Unproven and Proprietary Artificial Intelligence on the Voter Signature Verification of Over 1.3 Million Ballots**

**Q: Was this legal?**
---
| Voters in Mohave County, Arizona reported concern that their votes were being diluted by events in Maricopa County. This litigation seeks to uncover the source of their concerns. We look forward to seeing the case tried in court to ensure that these citizens, and all Americans, can be confident that their votes count. True the Vote stands with these voters and is proud to provide research and legal resources to support them in their fight for fair elections.
---
|
---
| | [**Click here to read the full case filing with exhibits**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1201b533b0&e=ad8cba7e98) Either Maricopa used computers that wrongly influenced humans \- or - humans tried to accurately verify all 1.3 million early ballots by themselves, which doesn't seem plausible to do in the time allotted. So Mohave County voters have questions. As do, frankly, people around the country watching this election. This suit hopes to encourage Maricopa to provide answers, hold any responsible parties accountable, and rely upon Arizona state law to provide the appropriate remedy.

The Return Hearing is scheduled for Friday, December 16th. We will continue to provide updates as they become available.
---
| [Support the Fight for Fair Elections](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2c7fbe8693&e=ad8cba7e98 "Support the Fight for Fair Elections")

**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.comFrom: Maryland Governor Larry Hogancc: An America UnitedDate: Wednesday, December 14th**Re: **Cybersecurity
---
|

My friend, we MUST stop putting our country's cybersecurity at risk. China is using social media apps like _TikTok_ to harvest as much data as possible to compromise American cybersecurity. Maryland is the cyber capital of America, and we have been at the forefront of our security initiatives, including hosting cybersecurity summits, and taking action to make sure we are safe from threats from China. I've issued a statewide ban of _TikTok_ and other Chinese and Russian-influenced products and platforms on state-issued phones and electronic devices. We are urging the federal government and other states to follow our lead. **_Thanks to An __America United's national advocacy network and messaging platform, w_ _e are not alone in wanting to secure our country's assets. Our members have helped talk to legislators and asked them to do the right __thing_ _._** Since Maryland's ban, other governors have followed suit, and Congress is working on solutions to ban the use of TikTok on statewide & national technology. **We need your help if we want to continue getting the message out that cybersecurity is no joke.** **→→** [**Please contribute $10 or anything you can to help our messaging team fund print, digital, and in-person initiatives.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=83014bf8f1a74b99a350e594cc24b0e9&_e=1FxsXzD8PrjmG9p0jIREEFPEgi09Fw1QbRioitk1jeHipVY9vqcSthiucOOe4nxwrDcErxD2ziciqXO2B432tqjwUQUwdgZD8JCvK7Z5pc2mceztF50YfVmv_ERr8SpPIZVUX3xCy9oAy3CCullBfjyuVVm0a4C2yeKRgGrGaPEmCFTWRjxeEplc8_0hDEsD5jO-HbuSLBI_fp_noQeFfsDOjEsWDqv2anOcXu5EybTsjaJgtLVUDqgZXL8h0_D0Gasx4tk9oih3zpt8jYTM3Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | MEMO To: dpwillis67@gmail.comFrom: Maryland Governor Larry Hogancc: An America UnitedDate: Wednesday, December 14thRe: Cybersecurity | My friend, we MUST stop putting our country's cybersecurity at risk. China is using social media apps like TikTok to harvest as much data as possible to compromise American cybersecurity. Maryland is the cyber capital of America, and we have been at the forefront of our security initiatives, including hosting cybersecurity summits, and taking action to make sure we are safe from threats from China. I've issued a statewide ban of TikTok and other Chinese and Russian-influenced products and platforms on state-issued phones and electronic devices. We are urging the federal government and other states to follow our lead. Thanks to An America United's national advocacy network and messaging platform, w e are not alone in wanting to secure our country's assets. Our members have helped talk to legislators and asked them to do the right thing . Since Maryland's ban, other governors have followed suit, and Congress is working on solutions to ban the use of TikTok on statewide & national technology. We need your help if we want to continue getting the message out that cybersecurity is no joke. →→ Thank you, Governor Larry Hogan | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

I'm calling on my most LOYAL and steadfast supporters to STAND WITH ME against this HOAX. I need YOU to get on the team as an AMERICAN DEFENDER and tell the Left that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. I've been going through these hoaxes and scams ever since the day I took my famous escalator ride in Trump Tower in 2015. THIS HAS TO END. Our Country is the laughingstock of the World, and Joe Biden is a corrupt and incompetent political hack. I know you agree, Friend, and this is your chance to publicly show where you stand! I'll review a list with the names of the proud Patriots who rushed in their support, and I want to see YOUR name at the TOP. Thank you, Donald J. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Full Mag News
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=165a64282cca4d199d1b15ab4f7ea2e5&_e=qrJkupHaub1oNk04HIMQqE0nz4t5cY-ESmmJNrEMHCZS8GCp1UvpimE04Frrhststh9lVDnM1l4hgPsNTscXAY_YxvFIzjS3L07E4if6VkOTUYyZxVfCSqIsLCDi-KbJVymSGJAPmu5JR9FOZ8Q6492w4LgoSP56l3MAy6qckQ0IGHg6YgV0XyHka7Jv3bIFreGCRooz4oNtqCoF6UMJsIsLKDGKZQCuYnFza3w9xggX0mf72AwXMlnUVgoYnC3dMJegkBavAUefPl_HUOvPgO2crVHeem9CnecMSq4F4CDz5z9vrH00KXUhHi33a9w-SmqWD0FWiiVYVrx0P0Crzp_pBU6fDfZRavk8GPjaBPw%3D) Dear Friend of the Constitution,
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=165a64282cca4d199d1b15ab4f7ea2e5&_e=qrJkupHaub1oNk04HIMQqE0nz4t5cY-ESmmJNrEMHCZS8GCp1UvpimE04Frrhststh9lVDnM1l4hgPsNTscXAY_YxvFIzjS3L07E4if6VkOTUYyZxVfCSqIsLCDi-KbJVymSGJAPmu5JR9FOZ8Q6492w4LgoSP56l3MAy6qckQ0IGHg6YgV0XyHka7Jv3bIFreGCRooz4oNtqCoF6UMJsKb09rbxUxjBP9xvDo_qg43O8t-4dY1zdSkzW1glayv7ZACV87-IsXcDRVUu2SIcaEeag4n3CNVyk9FD8ib4nKf-vRVj9FJF7ggO77MavTH_BKt6pWuYSzhLOHp5nIRrkP-4zeaJ9T1Ph6lvFO-8_ic%3D "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=165a64282cca4d199d1b15ab4f7ea2e5&_e=qrJkupHaub1oNk04HIMQqE0nz4t5cY-ESmmJNrEMHCZS8GCp1UvpimE04Frrhststh9lVDnM1l4hgPsNTscXAY_YxvFIzjS3L07E4if6VkOTUYyZxVfCSqIsLCDi-KbJVymSGJAPmu5JR9FOZ8Q6492w4LgoSP56l3MAy6qckQ0IGHg6YgV0XyHka7Jv3bIFreGCRooz4oNtqCoF6UMJsFrzPujj-uwn5v1Ao4lwKA8-YgPQHqShwn1go52dMm6s3pqVd_iNgX5ldTbvNlvqftfKqvNafAyyYIhIocTfhj40aB3XEc4yeW5KkXtBF1XMflUsfzZgWDHBfx4A6jadVdoJ4K1g7kDkNiPiR2FeJGk%3D)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=165a64282cca4d199d1b15ab4f7ea2e5&_e=qrJkupHaub1oNk04HIMQqE0nz4t5cY-ESmmJNrEMHCZS8GCp1UvpimE04Frrhststh9lVDnM1l4hgPsNTscXAY_YxvFIzjS3L07E4if6VkOTUYyZxVfCSqIsLCDi-KbJVymSGJAPmu5JR9FOZ8Q6492w4LgoSP56l3MAy6qckQ0IGHg6YgV0XyHka7Jv3bIFreGCRooz4oNtqCoF6UMJsD9qx8fGtit_8IICCWeh7jNhkKe0T1qj_Gmr_K3UWqIaFy6sFIduuA5ymN7H5Du0-KNH7uZhhpcUCR7s5RDvlQDhzkznhxzMwsRTXOe-QoAA4IJWcX3ZDqlQRjDlDw36RH6VKDEBExiIwKdPdZU_Q98%3D)**

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? name: Team AOC
subject: AOC doesn’t do cocktail party fundraisers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AOC doesn’t spend her time schmoozing for donations from big donors.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221214-3704-header&t=1&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)
Unlike most other politicians, AOC doesn’t spend her time schmoozing for donations from big donors or at exclusive events. Instead **our campaign relies on online donations from supporters who give $5 or $10 at a time through emails like this one.**
But, to be honest, fewer people donated through email the last couple of weeks than we expected.
[Can you chip in right now to fuel our campaign and help us get to our 8,000 contributions goal before the end of the year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221214-3704-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221214-3704-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)
**Our campaign takes 0 corporate donations.** There’s no super PAC or big donor coming in to protect us from the attacks constantly coming our way. So if our donations drop, as they have been starting to lately, we will have to reassess our budget and make tough cuts. And that’s not how we’d like to start the new year.
[A donation of any amount from you today would make a huge impact toward helping us hit our 8,000 contributions goal before December 31. Can we count on your donation today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221214-3704-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221214-3704-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)**
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your continued support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221214-3704-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=24&refcode2=3704_2526796_AKx7J8&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221214-3704-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=25&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3704%2E2526796%2EAKx7J8)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Team Landsman
subject: Greg really wants your input, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
We want you to make your voice heard

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55972916/383426974/-1334107482?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI1ZmE4ZS1mODdiLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KEFe_RmLUia3ksiYjuqFpCICLnEjm5K0DGenUBK58c=)
---
Folks, last week Congressman-elect Landsman sent you a personalized survey asking for your input regarding strategy and priorities for the year ahead.

Supporters like you are the reason we won this critical election and unseated an extreme incumbent, so we’re reaching out again to make sure you have your voice heard.

**It’s important to Greg that everyone has an opportunity to offer their thoughts and ask questions before his term in Congress begins.**

name: Fair Courts America
subject: the REAL reason behind rising crime…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
There’s one trend behind this crime wave, but it’s not what you think...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19af65aacf6444258c64560b94a9e63e&_e=YvR9EPWCZfzMpeKVjJ9zNmvPDTLMKa2StwYvvnW0yRm8_jpNxm-OCfXdQmFAOLrb9O2IOyqfkt-PJM7N5tR-IbnWjMnjmQtEYgHRfuo5rPiBi7D8o_7qnW_NjG9GlBDzU6PPkbG4lQposnisKGBCj4HmEQbCRk31l7vNaLlkdsFJJHF6mCGEC4u_UPuWwozxUhJR_A6WsD74sThpfHdWtmrf8k5xnMwZM_6-vNHFrVYuGjDu75u1Q9QxYIaF8E2dfXi1ttyX4_q1kFt7WOvl7S7_crSlD3VTWQez5Qyq82XwfX2rBdqzMxE2BJAHiV6fFSEFVRCD6emhYCSPTXyVBYeijmC1GWSynv5vYKwTjzBeBoIbHB7AEWrhuWpDChIOuhPTD4ZFbWTeBt1xHjT4n2wPCwM2dt7ywmplV-i3Cpm8am21plK9cjVfQARDS_pz)
---
Peter, I want to share a headline with you today — not because it’s remarkable, but because right now, _it’s sadly unremarkable_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19af65aacf6444258c64560b94a9e63e&_e=YvR9EPWCZfzMpeKVjJ9zNmvPDTLMKa2StwYvvnW0yRm8_jpNxm-OCfXdQmFAOLrb9O2IOyqfkt-PJM7N5tR-IbnWjMnjmQtEYgHRfuo5rPiBi7D8o_7qnW_NjG9GlBDzU6PPkbG4lQposnisKGBCj4HmEQbCRk31l7vNaLlkdsFJJHF6mCGEC4u_UPuWwozxUhJR_A6WsD74sThpfHdWtmrf8k5xnMwZM_6-vNHFrVYuGjDu75u1Q9QxYIaF8E2dfXi1ttyX4_q1kFt7WOvl7S7_crSlD3VTWQez5Qyq82WDpZ-8lgrLvC2i_Ya1YSfegtz3wRIKIxcYzcQ4SGpdYeAtHJGXiq5kSAt_eIQRRWFHE730DPOtg_vo0VveOeK1IEV2VdwNpZGB-3YXeujw78bPxn3DmOTSd0YLjuSjD-sgOTWCeoom6ZSQtZrjhk4l)
---
_**Peter, this headline is the new normal for the criminal justice system in our country — and it’s exactly why our nation is suffering a massive crime wave.**_ How did this happen? A network of radical activists and billionaires, including George Soros, quietly poured tens of millions of dollars into local prosecutor races.
---
[**HELP US STOP THEM**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19af65aacf6444258c64560b94a9e63e&_e=YvR9EPWCZfzMpeKVjJ9zNmvPDTLMKa2StwYvvnW0yRm8_jpNxm-OCfXdQmFAOLrb9O2IOyqfkt-PJM7N5tR-IbnWjMnjmQtEYgHRfuo5rPiBi7D8o_7qnW_NjG9GlBDzU6PPkbG4lQposnisKGBCj4HmEQbCRk31l7vNaLlkdsFJJHF6mCGEC4u_UPuWwozxUhJR_A6WsD74sThpfHdWtmrf8k5xnMwZM_6-vNHFrVYuGjDu75u1Q9QxYIaF8E2dfXi1ttyX4_q1kFt7WOvl7S7_crSlD3VTWQez5Qyq82XAN0icC9hhDDrNE8eEwd7JawE5Qo7Z86aQxwGzNP-uOvpkjRtajqYzJ44FgMRyUX5DS6tDeSmljg0SDC1hP_srn2XVWj6TYyknN0z6uwKbULcZjjV5X6wWr93VBHRJyll2HPbL5PgR_ETcR8sxFoua)
---
That tidal wave of cash overwhelmed these under-the-radar elections and placed radicals into prominent law enforcement positions.
And, once they got there, they stopped enforcing the parts of the law they didn’t like — and the effect has been dire.
_**At this point, they are not just failing to address rising crime but actually causing it**_** _._ **Letting violent offenders go free, eliminating bail, and treating criminals like victims only leads to more victims of violent crime.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19af65aacf6444258c64560b94a9e63e&_e=YvR9EPWCZfzMpeKVjJ9zNmvPDTLMKa2StwYvvnW0yRm8_jpNxm-OCfXdQmFAOLrb9O2IOyqfkt-PJM7N5tR-IbnWjMnjmQtEYgHRfuo5rPiBi7D8o_7qnW_NjG9GlBDzU6PPkbG4lQposnisKGBCj4HmEQbCRk31l7vNaLlkdsFJJHF6mCGEC4u_UPuWwozxUhJR_A6WsD74sThpfHdWtmrf8k5xnMwZM_6-vNHFrVYuGjDu75u1Q9QxYIaF8E2dfXi1ttyX4_q1kFt7WOvl7S7_crSlD3VTWQez5Qyq82UjabNFBv-5jerwt35jvg21ENJi6T0h64Ahb8nLaOAe8NtMdK3EwuhIXh_3r_GhUEPznoXYlBqXIVoKuIJ1XvB-I4yYMZ4tMxFnZc2WCr3DQ1DSZJBAM-qE7GTC1DQ0uevPybdhdaHrBW1rR2hz0PWp)
---
Leftist-controlled cities like San Francisco and Chicago show the terrible, corrosive effect of radical prosecutors. We refuse to let far-left activists destroy our neighborhoods. **At Fair Courts America, we’re standing up to the tens of millions of dollars that deep-pocketed liberal megadonors and woke activists are pouring into these races. ** We make sure voters get the facts so they can elect prosecutors and judges who actually do their jobs — not activists who let criminals walk free. That is the ONLY way to ensure a future with equal justice under the law, as the founders intended. _That’s why Fair Courts America exists. _ **And today, we need YOUR help to keep the streets safe and our justice system free and fair. Will you step up?[ https://secure.winred.com/fair-courts-america/stop-radical-prosecutors](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=19af65aacf6444258c64560b94a9e63e&_e=YvR9EPWCZfzMpeKVjJ9zNmvPDTLMKa2StwYvvnW0yRm8_jpNxm-OCfXdQmFAOLrb9O2IOyqfkt-PJM7N5tR-IbnWjMnjmQtEYgHRfuo5rPiBi7D8o_7qnW_NjG9GlBDzU6PPkbG4lQposnisKGBCj4HmEQbCRk31l7vNaLlkdsFJJHF6mCGEC4u_UPuWwozxUhJR_A6WsD74sThpfHdWtmrf8k5xnMwZM_6-vNHFrVYuGjDu75u1Q9QxYIaF8E2dfXi1ttyX4_q1kFt7WOvl7S7_crSlD3VTWQez5Qyq82V8Ghl4PzWwdfkNrnzkn5trDX7j5dAayk4A-bfblk9DW8QdckJT6v_YIjDjq35cKctXfSm3hDZfpMmolA_toNSLctRs2Rqz0HanZDWJyh8TkS13sOvXtAyAX-UFTc8SdQXVuGpff4vRbjIlQOIXBLI0)** In justice, Andrew Wynne _Executive Director_**Fair Courts America**

Sinema knows this outrageous behavior has made her incredibly unpopular, and she recently changed her party to "Independent" to avoid facing a real Democratic challenge in a primary. She's doing this to blackmail the Party into not running a candidate against her, and we can't let her underhanded tactics win. [ ]That's why Our Revolution is launching our defeat Sinema fund now! Progressive Ruben Gallego is exploring a run against Sinema, and we need to show him we have his back. Can we count on you to rush a donation? name: SIGN YOUR NAME [re: Sen. Sinema] (protectvoting.org)
subject: what we want to say to Sen. Kyrsten Sinema:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **_This is UNFORGIVABLE!_** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=6&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt) After spending the first two years of Biden's presidency holding up his agenda, Sen. Kyrsten Sinema has ABANDONED the Democratic Party!

[That's why we're sending her a letter from 12,000 good Democrats letting her know that Democrats are FURIOUS with her decision to leave the party at this crucial moment »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=7&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt) | [GIVE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=8&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt)
---
**TO: SEN. KYRSTEN SINEMA**
**From: A Frustrated Democrat**
**DATE: DECEMBER 14TH, 2022** **_Dear Senator Sinema,_**

How could you abandon us this way? We JUST expanded our Senate majority 8 days ago.

With the Senate majority so slim, passing Joe Biden's agenda is going to take all Democrats standing up and working together.

**But instead of working with your party, you are grandstanding and continue to hinder progress.** [**So right now, I 'm giving $7 to VPP to expand the Senate Majority because I refuse to let you rebuff all the work we need to get done »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=9&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt) | [GIVE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=10&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt)
---
❌ **STONEWALLING** the Build Back Better plan.
❌ **BOLSTERING** the filibuster.
❌ **REJECTING** voting rights.

Enough is enough -- _MAGA Mitch McConnell is thriving right now!_

If you refuse to stand up for Democratic priorities, our only choice is to expand the Senate majority and drown out your vote.
[**So right now, I 'm giving $7 to VPP to do just that! It's time to elect more Democrats who will vote to protect the American people »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=11&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt)
[GIVE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37608?t=12&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt)
---
Sincerely,

A Frustrated Democrat
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=5860%2E878179%2EOfntAt)

Entries must be received between October 22, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on December 31st, 2022, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Monday, December 31st, 2022. name: Democrats.org
subject: Derek, I am so proud.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The common denominator for all of our investments is the early and frequent support of this grassroots team. | |
---
Derek, I am so proud. I’m proud of the Democratic candidates up and down the ballot who ran to fight for working people. I’m proud of our organizers on the ground who mobilized millions of folks to get to the polls. And I’m proud of this grassroots team who donated and volunteered where you could this year. **It’s clear to me that grassroots donations from this team made a tremendous impact.** The victories we saw across the country were not a given -- not by a long shot. Midterms have historically been hard on the party in power, and many folks counted us out from the start. We could’ve given up at the first sign of trouble. But that's not the country that you or I believe in. Those aren’t the values we stand for. That’s not the party we belong to. This team donated your hard-earned time and money this midterm election cycle, and I could not be more grateful _(I mean, not only did we protect every incumbent Democratic Senator -- we**flipped** a Senate seat!)_. I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain exactly what you made possible:
* **Because of you, the DNC was able to invest heavily on the ground earlier than ever before.** In 2018, we invested just $30 million on the ground -- _this year we spent over three times that._ We invested nearly $100 million into states, organizing programs, voter protection, and Democratic staff across the country. That’s incredible!
* **Because of you, we were able to make a historic investment in voter protection work.** Working with our sister committees and state parties, Democrats were able to have Voter Protection Directors in 25 states and more than 100 total voter protection staff on the ground nationwide ahead of Election Day 2022. A powerful program that no doubt protected and mobilized many voters.
* **Because of you, Derek, we also were able to share our message directly with voters as early as _last March_.** We worked to ensure voters knew what President Biden and Democrats had accomplished. We made investments on the ground in organizing and mobilizing supporters around key moments, from the ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , to the president’s signing of the _Inflation Reduction Act_. Ahead of Election Day, we made a historic eight-figure investment in advertising efforts online and media directed at voters who were key to our winning coalition this midterm election cycle. Let me be crystal clear: Nearly the entirety of our paid media work to communicate Democratic accomplishments and draw contrasts with Republicans went into core Democratic communities and communities of color.

I could go on and on, but the common denominator for all of our investments is the early and frequent support of this grassroots team. As you look back on this cycle, I hope you feel proud and hopeful. I know that I do. I also need you to know that our fight is far from over. While we’ve made incredible strides this cycle, I am counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will elect Democrats in years to come. We are strong, but lasting political power means we have to get right back to the work at hand. So, I have to ask: **[Will you make your first donation of the year to the DNC to help our party build on our progress in the coming years?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq-M-ANd3lndN8GjvuVTPv_AT_ba22K6HUsdX-L_RQGMOjc_ZdWvJO-8kN1WTvhkSRg9sXGMIkyFBkChT1FkAzuOvSdKotHUHRG99JX0F5ea21yUyCDQDsV3tDwmVDiEyXADmu4ApC_0tvLsr4Pe9rZOcxpLNXwCs_RI6tahfCmcffMdh_wEMtX4fKM3bjh_fDo-6F1OKrsMkJyCw-7BSsB5_oqJpwMLC5AEswdkPEy_i4Ms6aYNmgsO9N3-kt-3j0ThwEWr3HagFqqYFqqSIcXTKoNgNr0qvnwiU9t_8Lit1Lfmn-tQo5jrSSkruzitA7hQ0GWgNC185RwyQJO9pU9V4SbKcdlLFTBTlPSS2TpnyZV82brGEF30XU5bvGYKZI6FRau4Y6PKgGkDdClV6JmCw67jeX29uX3jKdWRWT6134COeV634bezjSOigey-hhvIawn2vVOPS3KVF1je-mJm00pSSQw_8nD5GfCZuFb9Wsj2lDxAR1jmaDRK_79QfhfnEVawlexLWLP_3HeJTl9tbUDk2W7TMPJADkAiJv0Y4SV2ZfX9TGcoG4CidhMEQjZz3LdTVIdRDTktoYaWHpHNw2ouMculG4Ni5H9SuEPKZVVGe6HpC8Pxe2t33svX4-FvrKs_9biNf7XZ2JvNR7ru/3rz/CSYgJ-xBQN6e1jaek7pY8g/h0/PTG00exFV2Q820x1Acy1zlVrO9HaHsJ6jbHlVZBkHpo)** Thanks for everything you’ve done and will continue to do. Working with our sister committees and state parties, Democrats were able to have Voter Protection Directors in 25 states and more than 100 total voter protection staff on the ground nationwide ahead of Election Day 2022. A powerful program that no doubt protected and mobilized many voters. Because of you, Derek, we also were able to share our message directly with voters as early as last March. We worked to ensure voters knew what President Biden and Democrats had accomplished. We made investments on the ground in organizing and mobilizing supporters around key moments, from the ruling overturning Roe v. Wade , to the president’s signing of the Inflation Reduction Act. Ahead of Election Day, we made a historic eight-figure investment in advertising efforts online and media directed at voters who were key to our winning coalition this midterm election cycle. Let me be crystal clear: Nearly the entirety of our paid media work to communicate Democratic accomplishments and draw contrasts with Republicans went into core Democratic communities and communities of color. I could go on and on, but the common denominator for all of our investments is the early and frequent support of this grassroots team. As you look back on this cycle, I hope you feel proud and hopeful. I know that I do. I also need you to know that our fight is far from over. While we’ve made incredible strides this cycle, I am counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will elect Democrats in years to come. We are strong, but lasting political power means we have to get right back to the work at hand. So, I have to ask: Thanks for everything you’ve done and will continue to do. It means a lot to me and to everyone at DNC HQ. More soon! Sam Sam Cornale Executive Director Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, .
